name: The DC Bugle
subject: Quitting Is Not an Option
body:
“People ask me all the time, ‘How did you do it?’”
[unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0oxiw8n3jc4dx1jinci1c38r13bjhtarvyttxid6okr9elfbaql204wqmlse8ci6upb5r2ert6&__stmp=t1b0kp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
“People ask me all the time, ‘How did you do it?’” | | | | |
---
| | Awakened by missile warning sirens at 6:30 a.m. on October 7, 2023, Alisa Krant, a 23-year-old Israeli paramedic, was racing south an hour later in a bulletproof ambulance, **headed toward black smoke, explosions, and gunfire** at the Gaza border. When she and her team arrived, they got right to work, risking their lives to treat and evacuate victims of a brutal massacre. She didn’t think twice about driving into active combat zones. _“It was just obvious that this was what I’d trained for._ **_And I’d do it again.”_** She recalls treating a police officer who had been shot when the police station in Sderot was overrun by terrorists. As the ambulance sped toward the hospital, he kept drifting in and out of consciousness. Alisa realized he was in critical condition and kept him alive by aspirating fluid from his chest in the back of the moving ambulance. At one point during the 20-minute ride, the officer grabbed Alisa’s hand and looked into her eyes. He had just rescued two little girls whose parents had been murdered in front of them. _“You saved me,”_ he whispered, _“like I saved them.”_ The sheer number of casualties that day was staggering, overwhelming the local hospitals. Later that afternoon, Alisa and several other paramedics converted a civilian evacuation bus into a mobile medical unit. _“There was no time to rest, no time to feel anything,”_ she said. _“It hit me only when I got home later that night.”_ Alisa is credited with saving dozens of lives that day _. “People ask me all the time, ‘How did you do it?’_** _But how could I not do it?”_** The brave men and women of **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** constantly face tragedy, disaster, and fear. Whether it’s terror attacks from Hamas or ballistic missiles from Iran, it would be easy for them to quit, to just walk away. But instead, they dig their heels in — and at times even run toward the smoke and gunfire.
---
[PLEASE GIVE NOW ►](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27csxi8i3xjda4tfdoyv9fzgf83ndf1wzht1y5ae7u0806znqfm1drhzy10xpuq9ofdwd0n3hgi6ife00k3uwife5tqc1cdlwhbx5wd2dnzmoq7lx1hgzqu77iwghqgmeg6sag8cdve3w54yqxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h)
For them, quitting is not an option — lives are on the line, and seconds can make the difference between life and death. But sadly, even such noble service is not without sacrifice. Since Hamas launched their attacks, more than 40 **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** paramedics and EMTs have lost their lives. Others have been wounded. And many carry scars that are not visible to the eye. And yet they keep showing up for ambulance shift after ambulance shift. _“For me, returning to work wasn’t hard,” Alisa said. “Going back to the sites of the attacks was._ _“I survived. I’m proud of what we did._**_And I’ll keep showing up_** _.”_
| |
---
| | Your giving makes the work of **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** possible. You help equip our 37,500 paramedics, EMTs, and volunteer first responders with bandages, medication, defibrillators, and even the very ambulances being used to answer emergency calls for help around the clock. Please help save lives in Israel with [your best gift today](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27csxi8i3xjda4tfdoyv9fzgf83ndf1wzht1y5ae7u0806znqfm1drhzy10xpuq9ofdwd0n3hgi6ife00k3uwife5tqc1cdlwhbx5wd2dnzmoq7lx1hgzqu77iwghqgmeg6sag8cdve3w54yqxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h)**.**
---
[SAVE LIVES IN ISRAEL ►](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27csxi8i3xjda4tfdoyv9fzgf83ndf1wzht1y5ae7u0806znqfm1drhzy10xpuq9ofdwd0n3hgi6ife00k3uwife5tqc1cdlwhbx5wd2dnzmoq7lx1hgzqu77iwghqgmeg6sag8cdve3w54yqxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h)
| | For Zion’s sake,
---
Catherine Reed Chief Executive Officer
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
**MAGEN DAVID ADOM** is Israel’s emergency services system, providing critical medical care and ambulance services for victims of terror, natural disasters, automobile accidents, and all other emergencies in Israel. It is also responsible for Israel’s national blood supply. **MAGEN DAVID ADOM** saves lives in Israel every day. Become a [Lifeline Partner](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=7lpngttfqqjtou2yymkymxngc031hdwblrcnpkitsrgxjjhr4x7r13tb4ykhqiu0mf72efw5fqwpftrlykwec1qb6zqm3h30laam03sqf7ti1g6t92jnwl0u6ka31hcgekswo72bpw6xbq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h) now.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0oxiw8n3jc4dx1jinci1c38r13bjhtarvyttxid6okr9elfbaql204wqmlse8ci6upb5r2ert6&__stmp=t1b0kp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=11qfvsq9v6vh47lgqmlw0hktf4vt8n6l5q0q3b0waga2zvo93k9xqxmvb4goeqxjmhhyd6ff9jj1u4tp65n3p4v88pdm82mz7hvfbanpcl9i3w3buyhdc7vc5if3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=ukxuchlat4h0mzgowphhx9u4jrzkwnz3h50nyc0yefh68dldj7efou6z8i2jvi4lg3zs5zvtcyfkms15s5rzjqjwzvqezavtqx3sbefg7gcvz5q19uxbj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b0kp&__onlt=h)

name: [VAP] Electoral College Team
subject: Stopping MAGA from gaming the system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082025_1&amount=25]
The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy.
We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years .
And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote ( in 2016 ) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election.
Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082025_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_1&amount=25]

GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=082025_1&amount=35]
The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote.
We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=082025_1&amount=25]
Onward,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082025_1&amount=20]

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Trump’s reality show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
While his opponents try to out-MAGA each other and impress Donald Trump, Chris Pappas is focused on what matters to Granite Staters.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)
So far there are two Republicans in the race for New Hampshire’s open Senate seat — and they are tripping over themselves to get Donald Trump’s endorsement.
Dan Innis recently praised President Trump’s abuse of power on DC’s streets and called for New Hampshire to replicate the Texas GOP’s redistricting scheme.
Scott Brown called Trump’s visit with Putin “a terrific show of force and peace” and spends more time talking about New York City politics than what’s happening here in New Hampshire.
Meanwhile both candidates have offered full-throated support for Trump’s Big Ugly Bill. Trump’s own Treasury Secretary says it contains “a backdoor for privatizing Social Security” — and here in the Granite State, more than 334,000 people rely on those earned benefits.
Dan Innis and Scott Brown seem to think they’re competing on a reality show, desperate to win the approval of Trump — who is reportedly courting an entirely _different_ candidate!
**While his opponents try to out-MAGA each other, Chris Pappas is focused on what really matters.** He is traveling across the state, talking to families and small business owners about how Trump’s trade war and other dangerous policies are creating uncertainty over the future.
And in Congress Chris introduced legislation to exempt U.S. small businesses from Canadian tariffs. Chris knows that Main Street is the backbone of New Hampshire's economy — and Trump’s costly tariffs imposed on our closest trading partner are already wreaking havoc.
**Let’s show the GOP that Granite Staters aren’t tuning in for their chaotic reality show.** We don’t want a Senator who works for Donald Trump — we want one who works for _us._
Chris is gearing up to fight back against the GOP’s billionaires and special interest groups with the same thing that helped him win four competitive races in New Hampshire: **_people power._**
[**Will you pitch in $5 right now to support Chris’s grassroots campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250820_1_realityshow?refcode=em20250820-1949&amount=5&refcode2=1949_582294_g9eGoV&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250820_1_realityshow?amount=5&refcode=em20250820-1949&refcode2=1949_582294_g9eGoV&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)**
Thank you,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250820-1?t=2&refcode2=1949_582294_g9eGoV&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1949%2E582294%2Eg9eGoV)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

name: Jim Marchant
subject: They want to steal Nevada again
body:
The Left is rigging elections and silencing conservatives. I will fight for fair elections and for Nevada voters.
| | | | | [](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xa3EjNh4cfqs69QULiStm-oSrP-pfqXvoiqrgjBurV57_FNBsipcqKs_5i81eBZCzr7YsMkUF0mfYvrK22X8Um93kT5_jAyHyMZoGf5pKuasrA1ADGFgXAJAOsui9hIGjlr0zmTylG-3_iwd8KLjfGUmdubgi6KH&c=fthYLQX_WX7FqWZoEGaWPXylb7htQPgfIfRhz4suY3lk31EbHIcppw==&ch=Ja1WwWORpux_0IeEc1pwAaaeSxGYiSoi8kLXmXiIwtKp4kkCXEkUwA==)
---
| Peter,
---

Friend, Every election, the Left tries to STEAL OUR VOICES and undermine the will of Nevada voters. They know conservatives are winning, so they push mail-in ballots, manipulated machines, and biased rules to tip the scales in their favor.
I will not let them get away with it. I will fight to protect every legal vote, secure our elections, and ensure Nevada voters are heard loud and clear.
This is about more than politics. This is about preserving our freedom, our values, and the future of our state. If we do not fight, they will take everything from us.
I need you with me! Chip in today to help me defend Nevada and restore election integrity.
Together, we will ensure every vote counts and every Nevadan has a voice.
---
| [Save Nevada Today](https://sb6nl6fbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xa3EjNh4cfqs69QULiStm-oSrP-pfqXvoiqrgjBurV57_FNBsipcqECdHyb45dCzpu8MO2J37xw94BPE7XvPysvKT3JtNTpnyPp9qTeEUW2uBN57qwQMZGCwk9J-sONHoLb84xhVUi4DBIr4tWqnuVEFBjIfnq_t9g5g2uv2Szn1-t-0V-rsY9VMwF5cago7t3wmpKIEtYU=&c=fthYLQX_WX7FqWZoEGaWPXylb7htQPgfIfRhz4suY3lk31EbHIcppw==&ch=Ja1WwWORpux_0IeEc1pwAaaeSxGYiSoi8kLXmXiIwtKp4kkCXEkUwA==)

subject: Bye, Bye, Boebert!!

body:
MAGA loyalist Lauren Boebert is up for reelection in 2026 — and it’s time we end her disastrous political career.
| | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3e06dab-ae63-4ec5-a5ed-a50f28c8ab6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5536832-fbf8-44b6-9a40-c519560a8fb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, MAGA loyalist Lauren Boebert is up for reelection in 2026 — and it’s time we end her disastrous political career. Since 2020, she has backed Trump’s extremist attacks on our democracy, rights, and freedoms. Colorado — and all of America — can’t afford to see her elected to a fourth term. Thankfully, bold Democrats like Eileen Laubacher are rising to defeat Rep. Boebert. Eileen Laubacher is a retired Admiral in the U.S. Navy who has spent her life in service to our country and our democracy — and she and other Democrats will need our help to win this race. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta87a1720-9b5a-4fca-ade8-0ffc160082fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**[Peter, Lauren Boebert won reelection in 2024 by just 546 votes! This is a winnable race for Democrats — but only if we get a grassroots movement going right now. Will you please chip in $10 or more today to help Democrats defeat Lauren Boebert and other MAGA extremists next year?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3719eb7-de69-402a-9d7d-70ff485b4479/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88e34616-9254-4ea8-a2b9-3656d848dbd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Fight Crime: Send the National Guard to Mar-a-Lago to keep an eye on America's most dangerous criminal
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Fight Crime: Send the National Guard to Mar-a-Lago](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf73c64ba-d8e3-4427-9aa2-d25e7ea49dfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Donald Trump claims he is pouring National Guard troops into DC to fight crime, even though crime is at a 30-year low and falling. Trump has 30+ convictions, with probably a few hundred (thousand?) other crimes that we're yet to find out about. Want to fight crime? It's pretty obvious what we need to do. [**Fight Crime: Send the National Guard to Mar-a-Lago**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae965d43-47ab-4457-98ae-38a5bb616cea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [And let them keep an eye on America's most dangerous criminal of all.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc789aea2-4ab4-48a9-8e94-2e5c0804cebd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Mark Warner
subject: a short note for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek, in a moment, I’m going to make a simple statement.
If you agree with it, I’m asking that you split a donation of $5 to my reelection campaign and Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC ahead of our next end-of-month fundraising deadline:
Since my Republican colleagues can’t find their voices to speak out against the Trump administration, they prove that taking back the Senate for Democrats is the only way we can hold him accountable for his dangerous chaos.
Will you chip in $5, or anything you can, to defend my seat, support Tim Kaine, and help flip the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
The more I call out my Republican colleagues for bending the knee to Trump’s every demand, the more I become a top GOP target in next year’s election. Which means I need to be prepared to take on Republican dark money attacks.
That’s why I’m asking if you’ll chip in to my reelection campaign before my important end-of-month deadline. I need to secure an additional 1,750 grassroots donors to stay on track for the month, so we can fight off the attacks we know are coming my way, win this race, and take back the Senate for Democrats.
Here’s a link to split a contribution between Tim's Common Ground PAC and my campaign, if you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
The fight continues,
Mark Warner
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. clean_body: Derek, in a moment, I’m going to make a simple statement. If you agree with it, I’m asking that you split a donation of $5 to my reelection campaign and Tim Kaine's Common Ground PAC ahead of our next end-of-month fundraising deadline: Since my Republican colleagues can’t find their voices to speak out against the Trump administration, they prove that taking back the Senate for Democrats is the only way we can hold him accountable for his dangerous chaos. Will you chip in $5, or anything you can, to defend my seat, support Tim Kaine, and help flip the Senate blue? [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] The more I call out my Republican colleagues for bending the knee to Trump’s every demand, the more I become a top GOP target in next year’s election. Which means I need to be prepared to take on Republican dark money attacks. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll chip in to my reelection campaign before my important end-of-month deadline. I need to secure an additional 1,750 grassroots donors to stay on track for the month, so we can fight off the attacks we know are coming my way, win this race, and take back the Senate for Democrats. Here’s a link to split a contribution between Tim's Common Ground PAC and my campaign, if you can: [] The fight continues, Mark Warner CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We were already a top target for the GOP, and this all but guarantees Republicans will be spending tens of millions of dollars to try and buy this seat.

**Here’s the good news:** A recent poll showed me as the only Democrat likely to defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate Mike Rogers – the same Republican who benefited from the GOP’s $80 million war chest last year.

Make no mistake, this race will be extremely close, and the Senate majority will likely run through Michigan. That’s why we can’t afford to sit back.

I’ve been a fighter my entire life. In 2018, I flipped a red district blue and helped take back the House. And now? I’m ready to keep standing up for every Michigander concerned about rising costs, erratic tariffs, and cuts to programs that working families have paid into their entire lives.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: here’s how much DOGE wasted in just 6 months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113680942/564573397/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ1YzdiMi1mMTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-_2L6SlRd6VgVDcbQrYxfBoLCNcWyvdCCjvxt2SzZc=&emci=b01b4cac-f17d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=4bd5c7b2-f17d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=13185894) Derek, I'm all for making our government more efficient. But DOGE paying government employees NOT to do their work for the American people? That’s wasting tens of billions of public money. Instead of creating a more efficient government, a new Senate report revealed that DOGE actually wasted **$27.1 billion** in just six months. $14.8 billion of that was spent to cover Trump’s Deferred Resignation Program, and pay 200,000 workers to not show up to work for eight months. Another $6.1 billion was spent to cover the 100,000 plus workers placed on administrative leave—who were also paid to not do their jobs. And $150 million was spent on wasted resources due to DOGE shutting down several aid organizations and cutting back governmental operations. Derek, I’m fed up with the Trump administration’s reckless policies that gut our key public services and threaten the programs Western Pennsylvanians have funded and earned. [**I’m fighting back to protect public funds and ensure our government is working for the people. If you’re with me, please pitch in now to help me keep up this fight in Congress →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113680943/564573403/-898016266?refcode=email_082025_DOGE&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ1YzdiMi1mMTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-_2L6SlRd6VgVDcbQrYxfBoLCNcWyvdCCjvxt2SzZc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113680944/564573410/-898016266?refcode=email_082025_DOGE&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ1YzdiMi1mMTdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-_2L6SlRd6VgVDcbQrYxfBoLCNcWyvdCCjvxt2SzZc=)

clean_body: Derek, I'm all for making our government more efficient. But DOGE paying government employees NOT to do their work for the American people? That’s wasting tens of billions of public money. Instead of creating a more efficient government, a new Senate report revealed that DOGE actually wasted $27.1 billion in just six months. $14.8 billion of that was spent to cover Trump’s Deferred Resignation Program, and pay 200,000 workers to not show up to work for eight months. Another $6.1 billion was spent to cover the 100,000 plus workers placed on administrative leave—who were also paid to not do their jobs. And $150 million was spent on wasted resources due to DOGE shutting down several aid organizations and cutting back governmental operations. Derek, I’m fed up with the Trump administration’s reckless policies that gut our key public services and threaten the programs Western Pennsylvanians have funded and earned. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. subject: The sky isn’t falling quite yet. But this isn’t good.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re reaching out because you’re one of our most reliable supporters, and we need to dig deep right now

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113681199/564574175/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM5Nzg0NS1mMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmI2g-TgXPwwiaVotD4cZbkSuqQ4-nL9GBe-VIIb0Vs=) We’re reaching out because you’re one of our most reliable supporters, and we need to dig deep right now. Here’s why: Around this time each year, our fundraising numbers usually take a dip — a dip we fully expect and plan for. Families have just wrapped up their summer vacations and, understandably, are thinking more about paying for school supplies than the next election. But we want to be completely transparent: **We never expected a fundraising dropoff like this.** _The average number of donations we’re getting when we reach out to our supporters through email has been**cut in half** compared to last month._ Look, we don’t want to be one of those campaigns that scares you into donating. We still have some time to bounce back before our next fundraising deadline, so this isn’t the end of the world. But it isn’t good. If this trend continues, National Republicans will have a field day — and that’s why we need your help. [_**Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to help us avoid a budget shortfall? With so much at stake in next year’s midterms, we can’t hand National Republicans any kind of advantage here in KS-03.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113681200/564574176/212706120?refcode=email_082025_sky&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM5Nzg0NS1mMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmI2g-TgXPwwiaVotD4cZbkSuqQ4-nL9GBe-VIIb0Vs=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113681201/564574177/212706120?refcode=email_082025_sky&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTM5Nzg0NS1mMjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmI2g-TgXPwwiaVotD4cZbkSuqQ4-nL9GBe-VIIb0Vs=)

name: Team Haley Stevens
subject: [Live Poll] Democrat Stevens vs. MAGA Republican Rogers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Counting on you to respond

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4825?t=2&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
| | **Michigan Senate Polling Update:
Democrat Haley Stevens ONE POINT AHEAD of MAGA Republican Mike Rogers**
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4826?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
---
null, experts are predicting that Michigan could very likely decide Senate control, and _The Cook Political Report_ ranked this seat as a pure "Toss Up."
---
That means this race is going to be decided on the margins, which is why we urgently need to confirm where grassroots Democrats stand.

**We're looking for 10,000 responses to our live straw poll before midnight tonight. Tell us now:**
---
**Who would you vote for in Michigan's Senate race?**
---
| | | [Haley Stevens](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4826?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
---
| [Mike Rogers](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4826?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
---
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4827?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4825?t=7&akid=643%2E49239%2ECFNFh0)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Fighting fire with fire
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113681745/564575738/1631137775?refcode=em-8.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I4NTNiNC1mMzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lx-HB3Yhf_NpMf6Xgy0mVxumMDsVVv4sckESyYEmwjE=)

There is a lot of noise about redistricting in the news, Peter.

California is on the frontlines of efforts to stop Donald Trump and Texas Republicans from rigging next year’s midterm elections in their favor.

After the Texas GOP vowed to redraw their lines to give Republicans in Congress FIVE more seats, California leaders announced their intention to put a measure on the ballot to redraw our lines. This would balance out Republicans' blatant gerrymandering and make sure our elections are fair.

**We have to fight fire with fire. I fully support California allowing voters to put a check on Trump.**

While it is not yet clear how lines would be redrawn if this passes, make no mistake: **I got in this race to stop Trump’s attacks on our democracy, stop the MAGA agenda, and flip the House.**

I want you to know that I am more committed than ever before to see this through. I am not backing down.

**[But I need your support, especially in this uncertain and unprecedented time in our state and country, to keep up the pressure on my MAGA opponent. Will you rush in a $3 donation to stand with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113681748/564575741/1631137775?refcode=em-8.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2I4NTNiNC1mMzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lx-HB3Yhf_NpMf6Xgy0mVxumMDsVVv4sckESyYEmwjE=)**

clean_body: | = There is a lot of noise about redistricting in the news, Peter. California is on the frontlines of efforts to stop Donald Trump and Texas Republicans from rigging next year’s midterm elections in their favor. After the Texas GOP vowed to redraw their lines to give Republicans in Congress FIVE more seats, California leaders announced their intention to put a measure on the ballot to redraw our lines. This would balance out Republicans' blatant gerrymandering and make sure our elections are fair. We have to fight fire with fire. I fully support California allowing voters to put a check on Trump. While it is not yet clear how lines would be redrawn if this passes, make no mistake: I got in this race to stop Trump’s attacks on our democracy, stop the MAGA agenda, and flip the House. I want you to know that I am more committed than ever before to see this through. I am not backing down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. clean_body: He’s scheming to flip the House for Hakeem Jeffries. Peter , they're trying to WIPE US OUT. This is Congressman Eric Burlison, 🚨 Gavin Newsom just proposed a new redistricting map that would WIPE OUT 5 GOP SEATS in California, handing them straight to the Democrats. They're not even hiding it anymore. Newsom's scheme is designed to turn 9 Republican seats into just 4. And it's all part of a SICK plan to hand the gavel to his RADICAL pal Hakeem Jeffries. While we're focused on saving this country, While we're defending the Constitution, The America First Majority in the House is razor-thin. Just a few seats. That's it. If they flip 5, they take everything. I need you to picture this: This is the nightmare Newsom is planning, and we're running out of time to stop it. Peter , I'm BEGGING you-don't sit this one out. The Democrats already have their rich Hollywood friends and Silicon Valley elites flooding MILLIONS into California and beyond. They 're coming for our seats. They 're coming for our votes. They 're coming for our country. We need to HOLD THE LINE. Will you rush in to help me and my House GOP colleagues stop Newsom's gerrymandering scam? We are the last firewall. Let's show them we're not backing down. For Liberty, Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

clean_body: A nationwide petition drive| | | | | | | | My Fellow American,If you’re a Patriot who knows that we MUST accelerate the pace of deportations, We are launching a nationwide petition drive built around 3 simple steps to reach 1 million deportations by year-end: 1. Ban all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens 2. Shut off income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify” 3. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)...costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay.My team at NumbersUSA has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists. So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations...if you’re worried about all the illegals still here...and if you want to make a difference right now... Thank you, and God Bless you! | | Roy Beck FounderNumbersUSA | | | P.S. Click the button below to access your Deport 1 Million Petition. Peter,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks just reported a $2 million fundraising haul. **And if you think that money came from everyday Iowans, think again.**

Crack open her campaign books and you’ll find:

💰 A fat check from a corporate donor hoping for special treatment.

💸 Cash from political insiders who wouldn’t recognize Cedar Rapids if they tripped over it.

🥸 A pity-contribution from Speaker Mike Johnson.

🤑 Six times as much money from D.C. and Virginia donors as Iowa donors.

That’s not a campaign funded by the people of IA-01. It's a campaign bought and paid for by corporate boardrooms and political backrooms. **[Help us show the nation the strength of a real, people-powered campaign by making a donation to fuel Christina Bohannan's fight today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682211/564576774/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250820_MMMFR_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250820_MMMFR_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ab131c61-f47d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjEzMWM2MS1mNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLn96nHC8DxZNLu6Dp-mcSztBnzpXhtqTVkmnnDPNVs=)**

Christina’s campaign is powered by something very different: a strong grassroots movement right here in our community. And while we’re not asking you to donate an arm and a leg, we _are_ asking you to help us keep pace — because every dollar leads to another conversation with a voter, keeps our ads online one day longer, and builds the momentum we’ll need when it matters most in 2026.

Miller-Meeks is hustling for millionaire money. We’re hustling for the people. And with your help, we can give her a run for every last one of those $2 million.

**[Let’s show Mariannette that no amount of corporate cash can buy IA-01. Chip in whatever you can today and let’s elect a true leader in Christina to Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682212/564576775/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250820_MMMFR_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250820_MMMFR_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ab131c61-f47d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjEzMWM2MS1mNDdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sLn96nHC8DxZNLu6Dp-mcSztBnzpXhtqTVkmnnDPNVs=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Mariannette Miller-Meeks just reported a $2 million fundraising haul. And if you think that money came from everyday Iowans, think again. Crack open her campaign books and you’ll find: 💰 A fat check from a corporate donor hoping for special treatment. 💸 Cash from political insiders who wouldn’t recognize Cedar Rapids if they tripped over it. 🥸 A pity-contribution from Speaker Mike Johnson. 🤑 Six times as much money from D.C. and Virginia donors as Iowa donors. That’s not a campaign funded by the people of IA-01. It's a campaign bought and paid for by corporate boardrooms and political backrooms. = Christina’s campaign is powered by something very different: a strong grassroots movement right here in our community. And while we’re not asking you to donate an arm and a leg, we are asking you to help us keep pace — because every dollar leads to another conversation with a voter, keeps our ads online one day longer, and builds the momentum we’ll need when it matters most in 2026. Miller-Meeks is hustling for millionaire money. We’re hustling for the people. And with your help, we can give her a run for every last one of those $2 million. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We want to show him our appreciation for leading the Conservative fight in the Senate. We hope the Senator will see your name when he reads his card. Thank you, Team Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

There is no path to Democrats taking back the Senate without reelecting Jon Ossoff here in Georgia.
That’s why JD and the Trump administration are doing everything in their power to tear down Jon’s record and boost his far-right MAGA opponents.
**Peter, we need your help to make sure Jon has the resources to respond to JD’s attacks (whatever they are...) and set the record straight.**

body:
This deranged and mangled map is what we have in store for us if we lose this key court
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P4E3pwvabdg_FDzq-3awLRNjiQhXKkvRwj2bfn1iRMllj4Jf8DBjxi5S48CgHZ7IuPDSJ0GAnVLbsEWXaXPUI0C2NkNqMbLSvfGNxMLg8QJ4kVTlZt4ILF5JN7mnQelob4ODsxmJKWjT5k9tuokPH284CylT9zWxQXWygMW7xuRSUxJ5wJm_LUbHJCKFhcIIIAlnBwQrm62KTdSQ0GRLlbbbvcln5wNExPvyuSkNxzQ=&c=14OB6rgvCNjB-LBSyA9wzM3Erz9QDYm6NaqCYjo0Ot2YwTbxB6iSeg==&ch=yJFQDWVobrXu37xUS8ZqzBzwHlpWUWm7By5PMNtTJ1ma9maT0sqGJQ==)
---
| Peter,
We are ringing the alarm bell about the upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election. Even if you aren't in Pennsylvania the outcome of this race will deeply impact you.
The narrow Democratic majority on Pennsylvania's supreme court is a dam that is holding back some of the most deranged Republican election rigging and gerrymandering conceivable.
Take for instance the cursed 2018 Republican map for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District which the Dem majority on the PA Supreme Court was able to prevent:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P4E3pwvabdg_FDzq-3awLRNjiQhXKkvRwj2bfn1iRMllj4Jf8DBjxi5S48CgHZ7IuPDSJ0GAnVLbsEWXaXPUI0C2NkNqMbLSvfGNxMLg8QJ4kVTlZt4ILF5JN7mnQelob4ODsxmJKWjT5k9tuokPH284CylT9zWxQXWygMW7xuRSUxJ5wJm_LUbHJCKFhcIIIAlnBwQrm62KTdSQ0GRLlXXrEfsDCLVkKrzD478ZMbY=&c=14OB6rgvCNjB-LBSyA9wzM3Erz9QDYm6NaqCYjo0Ot2YwTbxB6iSeg==&ch=yJFQDWVobrXu37xUS8ZqzBzwHlpWUWm7By5PMNtTJ1ma9maT0sqGJQ==)
---
| | | | If we lose the Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court expect more monstrosities like this one. The entire PA Congressional map will be toon town.
Democrats rely on Pennsylvania for seven Democratic House seats and there are a minimum of four Republican seats that we could flip in 2026. If we lose the majority and a new Republican court is able to implement their map it could mean 17 Republican congressional seats in PA.
And good luck trying to win PA in a Presidential election. In 2024 MAGA tried to invalidate hundreds of thousands of Democratic ballots for mistakes as simple as not properly sealing mail in ballot envelopes, stray dots, or incomplete circles. The Dem court ruled that these votes must be counted. If our justices are voted out in November these voter protections go away.
This race is not getting the attention that it needs and unless we rapidly mobilize, we are about to get steamrolled. The Republicans are organized, mobilizing voters, and have over $30 million raised to sway this race. Democrats have prepared nothing so far.
[We have three months to prevent this catastrophe and Defend our Courts is one of the only Democratic organizations preparing to defend our Supreme Court justices from the Republican onslaught. Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us brace for impact and withstand this assault on our courts?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P4E3pwvabdg_FDzq-3awLRNjiQhXKkvRwj2bfn1iRMllj4Jf8DBjxi5S48CgHZ7IbX4vDxwaSd0DGe1vWFh1egmd4BtdsjBO-MoVIidOd0E-CNVHgbmwGrj4dYU_oucZcBO3p18BEpaRoKE6i8PQLpiHxsE1UFogPW_HtWHI9t-Z5Sg0NMDsnFS4cdldAHYc75m3y4CjiM-mK_mhKBm7iN_qAc8b4sJlyQsNS6rZmrOEGgBc23JxAw==&c=14OB6rgvCNjB-LBSyA9wzM3Erz9QDYm6NaqCYjo0Ot2YwTbxB6iSeg==&ch=yJFQDWVobrXu37xUS8ZqzBzwHlpWUWm7By5PMNtTJ1ma9maT0sqGJQ==)

Sign up for our free online course, "American Paintings," taught by Samuel Knecht, professor emeritus of art at Hillsdale College.

"American Paintings" will take you on a guided tour through American history using our artwork, teach you about our artistic heritage, and equip you with the knowledge needed to reclaim art from those who denigrate our country.

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Donald Trump is once again trying to destroy our democracy by undermining the will of the people. This time, he’s attacking mail-in voting:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682820/564578185/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcwOWU2Ny1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35dQ03AU9qpttS6ZiEQbnDl6AilMgODoosStFQUKZjw=) Team — Donald Trump is once again trying to destroy our democracy by undermining the will of the people. This time, he’s attacking mail-in voting: **_CBS: Trump vows to try banning mail-in voting before 2026 midterm elections_** President Donald Trump just promised to end all mail-in voting in the United States because, in his own words, "Mail-in ballots are corrupt," echoing what Russian President Vladimir Putin told him just DAYS ago. **Trump isn’t just trying to reshape our elections — _he’s trying to destroy the very tenets of American democracy._ ****[It’s time to raise hell and let everyone American know that Trump is attempting to steal the 2026 midterms right before our eyes. So please, help me sound the alarm by adding your name to our petition to defend mail-in voting. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682823/564578186/794639844?refcode=email_082025_mailvoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcwOWU2Ny1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35dQ03AU9qpttS6ZiEQbnDl6AilMgODoosStFQUKZjw=&emci=75ec2fae-da7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66709e67-f67d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=5643047)** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682825/564578187/794639844?refcode=email_082025_mailvoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcwOWU2Ny1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35dQ03AU9qpttS6ZiEQbnDl6AilMgODoosStFQUKZjw=&emci=75ec2fae-da7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66709e67-f67d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=5643047)**
---
**Not only does the President lack the Constitutional power to dictate election policy to the states, Trump’s claim is based on outright lies.** Oregon has been a vote-by-mail state for almost 30 years, and we have one of the safest, most secure, highest turnout elections systems in the entire country.
That’s not corruption.**That’s what Oregonians call democracy.**
Look, just this year I introduced the _Universal Right to Vote by Mail Act_ to create an option for no-excuse mail voting in all 50 states because I believe EVERY eligible voter, regardless of age, illness, disability, or employment should be able to participate in our elections.** ****[If you agree, please, add your name to my petition today and help us defend mail-in voting across the United States. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682826/564578188/794639844?refcode=email_082025_mailvoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcwOWU2Ny1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35dQ03AU9qpttS6ZiEQbnDl6AilMgODoosStFQUKZjw=&emci=75ec2fae-da7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66709e67-f67d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=5643047)**
| **[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113682827/564578189/794639844?refcode=email_082025_mailvoting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcwOWU2Ny1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35dQ03AU9qpttS6ZiEQbnDl6AilMgODoosStFQUKZjw=&emci=75ec2fae-da7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=66709e67-f67d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=5643047)**

name: Team Maxine
subject: This is what despots do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
This is what despots do:
🚨 Use military force to patrol the streets of the Capital, illegally harassing and detaining citizens.
🚨 Gerrymander voting districts to hold onto power while silencing the will of voters.
🚨 Attack our election integrity by going after vote-by-mail and voting machines—making it harder for working Americans, rural communities, students, seniors, and people with chronic illnesses or disabilities to vote.
Why? Don’t forget that Donald J. Trump lost the popular vote in 2016 and lost wholesale in 2020. He ran again in 2024 to stay out of prison.
Trump is acting like a strongman because he knows just how weak he really is.
For decades, Oregon has used mail-in ballots in our elections. It’s how we make sure everyone has a chance to share their voice and their priorities. It’s accessible, reliable, and secure.
Maxine herself is a co-sponsor of the Vote at Home Act of 2025 , which would allow every voter to vote by mail in federal elections and make it easier for people to register to vote instead of hacking through the Republicans' red tape and racist voter ID laws.
Donald Trump is attacking our democracy because he’s afraid. He knows what would happen if we stood up and exercised our rights. He’s afraid of us .
Donald Trump isn’t interested in building something to last. All he knows is how to burn the house down.
We need you in this fight. Every dollar helps us stand up to Trump, his cronies, and Republican enablers. body:
Virginia matters, Derek.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113683013/564578812/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjQ3ZmJmYS1mNjdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ma887Lzbot2XXPZQodKcZL7vQYBWmTm-3EkzoMp-WiM=&emci=63d0ccdb-237d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=f247fbfa-f67d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=15759664)
---
Hi Derek, This is an incredibly important time for Virginia. With all 100 House of Delegates seats up for election this year, this is our chance to increase our majority and keep moving Virginia forward. It will also give Democrats across the country a roadmap for how to win races in purple states, flip seats, and take back Congress in 2026. But to do any of that, we need to make sure our candidates in the closest races have the resources they need to win. Funds are going to be critical in fueling the air and ground game that wins elections like this. [**Can you chip in to help us hold onto our Assembly majority? With all 100 House of Delegates seats up for election this year, this is our chance to increase our majority and keep moving Virginia forward. It will also give Democrats across the country a roadmap for how to win races in purple states, flip seats, and take back Congress in 2026. But to do any of that, we need to make sure our candidates in the closest races have the resources they need to win. Peter,

**[The Trump administration is waging an unprecedented attack on reproductive freedom by taking aim at medication abortion.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113683127/564578997/-1275759257?sourceid=1150858&utm_campaign=26emcma-0802aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGRmYzIzNy1mNzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVYsawG-_Pef92mQa41iJ4ulBXIU6C1NUafyjiyMLdo=&emci=c2fadc48-dd7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=d8dfc237-f77d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=954237)**

Extremists like U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. are threatening to force restrictions on mifepristone, the proven-safe abortion pill trusted by doctors for over 20+ years.

**Medication abortion accounts for nearly two thirds of abortions in the U.S.** Losing access would endanger the health—and the lives—of millions. | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113683135/564579001/-1275759257?sourceid=1150858&utm_campaign=26emcma-0802aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGRmYzIzNy1mNzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVYsawG-_Pef92mQa41iJ4ulBXIU6C1NUafyjiyMLdo=&emci=c2fadc48-dd7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=d8dfc237-f77d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=954237 "ADD YOUR NAME")

This fight is about your right to:
* Make personal medical decisions
* Access proven, essential health care
* Control your body and your future

We cannot give an inch to extremists who want to overrule science and silence medical experts. **Everyone deserves the ability to make private health decisions without government interference.**

That is why we refuse to stay silent. [**Peter, speak up and add your name now to demand protections for medication abortion and ALL essential reproductive care!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113683147/564579021/-1275759257?sourceid=1150858&utm_campaign=26emcma-0802aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGRmYzIzNy1mNzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zVYsawG-_Pef92mQa41iJ4ulBXIU6C1NUafyjiyMLdo=&emci=c2fadc48-dd7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=d8dfc237-f77d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=954237)

clean_body: [ADD YOUR NAME]: Defend abortion pills | | | ---|--- Peter, Extremists like U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. are threatening to force restrictions on mifepristone, the proven-safe abortion pill trusted by doctors for over 20+ years. Medication abortion accounts for nearly two thirds of abortions in the U.S. Losing access would endanger the health—and the lives—of millions. | "ADD YOUR NAME" Despite decades of scientific evidence, FDA Commissioner Dr. Martin Makary has refused to commit to protecting abortion pill access. "FIGHT BACK" This fight is about your right to: Make personal medical decisions Access proven, essential health care Control your body and your future We cannot give an inch to extremists who want to overrule science and silence medical experts. Everyone deserves the ability to make private health decisions without government interference.** That is why we refuse to stay silent. With you in this fight, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

| | Dear Fellow Republican, **Congress of Counties isn’t just another conference—it’s the launchpad for Hoosier Republican leadership.**
In just two action-packed days, you’ll get hands-on training in campaign strategy, messaging, grassroots organizing, and data tools you can take back to your community. But it’s more than training, at Congress of Counties you will have the opportunity to connect with Hoosier Republicans from across our state, building the relationships we need to win in 2026. With the midterms just around the corner, every county, every precinct, and every volunteer matters—and it starts here! This is your opportunity to join Governor Braun and the INGOP Team to reenergize the Republican grassroots and recommit to our mission: electing conservative leaders, protecting Hoosier values, and delivering on freedom and opportunity. If you’re ready to lead where it counts, **Congress of Counties is where you belong!** Please see the attached Save the Date for more information or click the following link for our Congress of Counties webpage: [https://indiana.gop/about-the-event/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/_ys8-cHOQJRGXyhNKH9ePUd4JthFeEyWlQ5akIBMdnZ_v2E2Xexb-pASHk8Ux6Kg4fNJodWBuSh2EarNOY9kUtRQwzqvuqLKdT-AZNObxiiuxl-uV_Yarxt6mKPYWRR2e5OSnXIJTAhkPC2KrryGeb6oJnOtoMaHsRmC2vD36bA2vMp6Ltt6mTmBrc-3HIVuKLTKJm3k0x-zdmS7SeQsRW_cf7-GBErkNsAagoL8wxa8zDcqBJQx3Zg7ROk7IkSj-2kvBlOPuPfWUU7YpjONTcdhUyUWNkQPZABAlCNeHisBCE6fC_OZ92AnJfLPkHw6ki0wDrusQcwQ4CslPr46It_8YEGtC3JDCgSYaCvA5nV2M7-uL7DvjT4YguZea1Pl-GYllXg/kECZVQrSkaVBfQZx-kvicm3eYuqBV43o/12). Early Bird registration ends **November 1, 2025** , so don't miss out, register today! If you have any questions, please reach out to our team at [rsvp@indiana.gop](mailto:rsvp@indiana.gop "mailto:rsvp@indiana.gop"). Yours in service,
---
**Robb Greene** Executive Director, Indiana Republican Party

name: Eric Flores
subject: I’m officially running for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress
body:
I’ve spent my life leading troops & locking up criminals. But today I’m stepping up for a new fight.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b15j/?__vbtrk=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Maybe I put my hope in the wrong place.

Maybe I just expected too much.

I thought more red-blooded Americans were tired of seeing career politicians take advantage of us – and I thought we’d see a bigger response.

But so far – _most have looked the other way._

Fellow patriot, this is Eric Flores – I’m a father, Christian, fmr Army Captain, Assistant US Attorney & Pro-Trump conservative.

_**I JUST announced my candidacy for the most important House race in America.**_

And let me be crystal clear: _this one seat will decide the House Majority._

If we lose this race, we lose the House and President Trump’s America First agenda will be dead on arrival.

Democrats know it. The DC Establishment knows it. _**And now they’re doing everything in their power to CRUSH my campaign before it can even take off.**_

Friend, I know your inbox is flooded. I know you’re asked for help constantly. But this one race will define everything.

**[If just 4 more patriots answer this message right now, we can mount a real response. ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b15j/?__vbtrk=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

If not, the Left steamrolls us again and we lose all the progress President Trump has fought for.

If you’ve been even thinking about making a contribution this year—this is where it will matter the most.

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b15j/?__vbtrk=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | |
Even a few dollars will send a powerful message to the political elites that the American people are done being ignored.

I’m humbly asking ONE LAST TIME today: **[Will you stand with me?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b15j/?__vbtrk=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEyNjgwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

God bless you, Eric Flores

clean_body: I’ve spent my life leading troops & locking up criminals. But today I’m stepping up for a new fight. | | | | Maybe I put my hope in the wrong place. Maybe I just expected too much. I thought more red-blooded Americans were tired of seeing career politicians take advantage of us – and I thought we’d see a bigger response. But so far – most have looked the other way. Fellow patriot, this is Eric Flores – I’m a father, Christian, fmr Army Captain, Assistant US Attorney & Pro-Trump conservative. I JUST announced my candidacy for the most important House race in America. And let me be crystal clear: this one seat will decide the House Majority. If we lose this race, we lose the House and President Trump’s America First agenda will be dead on arrival. Democrats know it. The DC Establishment knows it. And now they’re doing everything in their power to CRUSH my campaign before it can even take off. Friend, I know your inbox is flooded. I know you’re asked for help constantly. But this one race will define everything. If not, the Left steamrolls us again and we lose all the progress President Trump has fought for. If you’ve been even thinking about making a contribution this year—this is where it will matter the most. | | | Even a few dollars will send a powerful message to the political elites that the American people are done being ignored. I’m humbly asking ONE LAST TIME today: God bless you, Eric Flores | | Use of candidate’s military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | | | Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress | | PO BOX 84 SAN BENITO, TX 78586 | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113684892/564584738/1328794144?refcode=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjk4NzI2LWY5N2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ifiuUtzLH8uqOtaT833UAbuWfx620bvOf0le7747as=&emci=894d411f-1c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)

We couldn’t let you miss this. The International Court of Justice just delivered the most significant climate victory in years, ruling that countries have a legal obligation to protect people from climate change. Unlike Trump's attacks on truth and science here at home, this international ruling is beyond his reach. **Over 4,000 members of this grassroots movement have already signed on to our petition demanding world leaders honor the U.N. Court's historic climate ruling — _but, as of 9:00 AM today, we’re still missing your name._** **[We need to add 1,000 more signatures before the end of today to show world leaders the overwhelming demand for real climate action. Take a moment to read the full message below, then add your signature to represent your community in Cresco in our petition >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113684893/564584740/-1571510754?refcode=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjk4NzI2LWY5N2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ifiuUtzLH8uqOtaT833UAbuWfx620bvOf0le7747as=&emci=894d411f-1c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)** | [**ADD MY NAME →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113684894/564584745/-1571510754?refcode=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjk4NzI2LWY5N2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ifiuUtzLH8uqOtaT833UAbuWfx620bvOf0le7747as=&emci=894d411f-1c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)

Date: Aug 11, 2025
Subject: The courts have spoken.
> Every victory matters in the ongoing climate fight. And the U.N.’s highest court just delivered a massive one.
> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113684896/564584759/-1571510754?refcode=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjk4NzI2LWY5N2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ifiuUtzLH8uqOtaT833UAbuWfx620bvOf0le7747as=&emci=894d411f-1c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)
> **The International Court of Justice unanimously ruled that countries have a legal obligation to protect people from the impacts of climate change.**
> In their ruling, the court even linked fossil fuel support to human rights violations, declaring that environmental destruction threatens our basic right to survive. Unlike the climate scientists Trump has silenced or the EPA findings he’s rolled back, this international ruling is beyond his reach to manipulate or erase.
> The most incredible part? This ruling was possible because of people power. It started with brave law students from Vanuatu — a Pacific island nation that is feeling the worst impacts of the climate crisis — who refused to let their voices be silenced. They had the guts to bring their case before the World Court, and they WON.
> **Now it’s up to us to turn this landmark ruling into action. Our leaders must take the climate crisis seriously, and the pressure starts with this grassroots movement. Right here, right now.**
> **[This verdict will only matter if we make it matter. Sign on now if you agree our world leaders must honor the U.N. Court’s climate ruling and protect our planet from the dangerous fossil fuel agenda.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113684897/564584766/-1571510754?refcode=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhNjk4NzI2LWY5N2QtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9ifiuUtzLH8uqOtaT833UAbuWfx620bvOf0le7747as=&emci=894d411f-1c7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=ca698726-f97d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: We’ve received record responses, but we need your voice, too. | We couldn’t let you miss this. The International Court of Justice just delivered the most significant climate victory in years, ruling that countries have a legal obligation to protect people from climate change. Unlike Trump's attacks on truth and science here at home, this international ruling is beyond his reach. Over 4,000 members of this grassroots movement have already signed on to our petition demanding world leaders honor the U.N. Court's historic climate ruling — but, as of 9:00 AM today, we’re still missing your name. | This victory only matters if we make it matter. Team JanePAC Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Signature Requested (via JanePAC.com) Date: Aug 11, 2025 Subject: The courts have spoken. Every victory matters in the ongoing climate fight. And the U.N.’s highest court just delivered a massive one. The International Court of Justice unanimously ruled that countries have a legal obligation to protect people from the impacts of climate change. In their ruling, the court even linked fossil fuel support to human rights violations, declaring that environmental destruction threatens our basic right to survive. Unlike the climate scientists Trump has silenced or the EPA findings he’s rolled back, this international ruling is beyond his reach to manipulate or erase. The most incredible part? This ruling was possible because of people power. It started with brave law students from Vanuatu — a Pacific island nation that is feeling the worst impacts of the climate crisis — who refused to let their voices be silenced. They had the guts to bring their case before the World Court, and they WON. Now it’s up to us to turn this landmark ruling into action. Our leaders must take the climate crisis seriously, and the pressure starts with this grassroots movement. Right here, right now. --- Onward, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Rep. Ilhan Omar
subject: It’s a disgrace and a human rights catastrophe.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is one of the most important fights of the 21st century
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)

Friend,
Last month, Republicans in Congress joined Trump to pass their Big (Ugly) Bill.
This disastrous bill will kick almost **17 million Americans** off their healthcare plans. It’s a huge step backward in a country that already struggles to do right by its own people when it comes to healthcare.
In almost every other advanced economy in the world, healthcare is a right. It’s guaranteed regardless of who you are or how much money you have.
But in America — the richest nation in the history of the world — we let thousands of people die and tens of thousands more go broke every year because they can’t afford care.
And more than that, we spend far more on health care than every other developed nation while providing less care for people and having worse health outcomes. **It’s a disgrace and a human rights catastrophe.**
Now, there has been a lot of debate for a long time on how to fix this problem. But the solution comes down to one idea, and it’s not a new one: **Medicare for All.**
Medicare-for-All does away with the tangled web of private insurance companies that serves only to line the pockets of CEOs and billionaire investors and replaces it with a universal approach that covers all Americans under Medicare, the most successful healthcare program the US has ever seen.
Tired of co-pays, deductibles, and premiums? Under Medicare-for-All you would have none.
Tired of sitting on hold with insurance companies, going back and forth over charges, only to get your coverage claims denied? Medicare-for-All would end that once and for all.
Tired of finding a promising provider for your health care needs only to learn that they’re not in your network? Medicare-for-All would cover every provider, everywhere.
As many are wondering what the Democratic Party stands for and how we can win back the trust of the American people in the Trump era, I can’t think of a better issue to put front and center than finally tackling our inhumane healthcare system with universal, affordable, and accessible coverage for all.
This is a problem that affects almost everyone, and polls show that Americans are ready to support big ideas to solve it.
So if you’re with me in the fight for a more healthy and prosperous future, I am asking for your support today:
**[Chip in to my campaign as we continue to push for Medicare-for-All and a future where everyone gets the healthcare they deserve. This is one of the most important fights of the 21st century, and we must win.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250820-1-180&t=2&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-aug25.l9ypIT&refcode=em250820-1-180&t=21&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-aug25.RQVE1H&refcode=em250820-1-180&t=25&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-aug25.cfZhOB&refcode=em250820-1-180&t=26&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)**
---
****
I often say that America doesn’t suffer from scarcity, we suffer from greed. We can and should provide quality healthcare for all, just like they do in dozens of countries around the world. The question is whether or not our leaders have what it takes to stand up to the greed of private health insurance and create a truly universal system for all.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=29&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1770_791427_K2yLW1&akid=1770%2E791427%2EK2yLW1)**.

clean_body: This is one of the most important fights of the 21st century Friend, Last month, Republicans in Congress joined Trump to pass their Big (Ugly) Bill. This disastrous bill will kick almost 17 million Americans off their healthcare plans. It’s a huge step backward in a country that already struggles to do right by its own people when it comes to healthcare. In almost every other advanced economy in the world, healthcare is a right. It’s guaranteed regardless of who you are or how much money you have. But in America — the richest nation in the history of the world — we let thousands of people die and tens of thousands more go broke every year because they can’t afford care. And more than that, we spend far more on health care than every other developed nation while providing less care for people and having worse health outcomes. It’s a disgrace and a human rights catastrophe. Now, there has been a lot of debate for a long time on how to fix this problem. But the solution comes down to one idea, and it’s not a new one: Medicare for All. Medicare-for-All does away with the tangled web of private insurance companies that serves only to line the pockets of CEOs and billionaire investors and replaces it with a universal approach that covers all Americans under Medicare, the most successful healthcare program the US has ever seen. Tired of co-pays, deductibles, and premiums? Under Medicare-for-All you would have none. Tired of sitting on hold with insurance companies, going back and forth over charges, only to get your coverage claims denied? Medicare-for-All would end that once and for all. Tired of finding a promising provider for your health care needs only to learn that they’re not in your network? Medicare-for-All would cover every provider, everywhere. As many are wondering what the Democratic Party stands for and how we can win back the trust of the American people in the Trump era, I can’t think of a better issue to put front and center than finally tackling our inhumane healthcare system with universal, affordable, and accessible coverage for all. This is a problem that affects almost everyone, and polls show that Americans are ready to support big ideas to solve it. So if you’re with me in the fight for a more healthy and prosperous future, I am asking for your support today: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | I often say that America doesn’t suffer from scarcity, we suffer from greed. We can and should provide quality healthcare for all, just like they do in dozens of countries around the world. The question is whether or not our leaders have what it takes to stand up to the greed of private health insurance and create a truly universal system for all. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

body:
This race is a dogfight
#

Friends, it's Arizona Senator Mark Kelly.
I know a thing or two about winning tough elections. And AZ-06 is shaping up to be one of the toughest races in the country.
Donald Trump won this district by just 1% last year. Winning a dogfight like this takes someone who knows how to fight and won’t back down.
**That’s why I’m proud to announce that I am endorsing JoAnna Mendoza for Congress. Winning here is going to take a grassroots movement, and JoAnna is exactly the candidate to make it happen.**
Jo and I have a lot in common. She is a retired U.S. Marine Corps Drill Instructor who served 3 combat tours in 2 different war zones. As a fellow veteran, I know she has the grit and determination to get the job done.
That’s why I’m writing to you today. The single most important thing you can do to help ensure Jo has the resources to win this fight is to make a grassroots contribution today.
