name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I wanted to inform you.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206ws2sbxcz1cijr12mt2zxh994uvzvwovxuk2143lv2d0m9ua1frfzs0diqwv1vyz47g4jwih99uh3z8ft&__stmp=t1b4fk&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hwsvns768w0vysk024sr24fev84i5o0r2phucybfgm0wu83lyeh11f2fhvbm37fbbjzz8ttr258p82vprbjk5j3fsv9ocjbqwajlqddugrjjexobpn1ijqb1dztsbmds65hfg8t9p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1hwsvns768w0vysk024sr24fev84i5o0r2phucybfgm0wu83lyeh11f2fhvbm37fbbjzz8ttr258p82vprbjk5j3fsv9ocjbqwajlqddugrjjexobpn1ijqb1dztsbmds65hfg8t9p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1b4fk&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: We've entered a new phase of fascism. This is extremely serious.
body:

🔻 Calling up the Marines
🔻 Sending in the National Guard
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
🔗 Mass arrests sweeping Washington, D.C.
🚨 Terrified mothers, fathers, and children, yanked off the streets and put into unmarked vans
❗ ❗ ❗ And since the Big TERRIBLE Bill increased the ICE budget by BILLIONS of dollars... this is just the beginning ❗ ❗ ❗
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Public office shouldn’t come with a meme coin side hustle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8923%2E5257348%2ECJW1-s)
Derek,
When Donald Trump took office, he launched a meme coin, opening the door for foreign nationals — who are banned from contributing to U.S. campaigns — to funnel money directly into his pockets.
It’s corruption, plain and simple. And it undermines the idea that our government should work for _everyone_ , not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected.
This is exactly why I introduced the _COIN Act_ to block public officials — including the President and Vice President — from profiting off crypto schemes and digital assets while in office, because no one, not even the president, should be allowed to trade power for personal profit.
**[If you agree that we need to fight back against corruption, will you support my work by chipping into my campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=q32025_abs_em.Sb5403&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8923%2E5257348%2ECJW1-s)**

One top Democrat insider just came clean and said the quiet part out loud: “We're worse off than 2016... Our party's a total joke.” Yikes. But don't let that fool you into thinking we can sit back. When the Democrats start to panic, they throw every wild idea they've got at the wall just to see what sticks. Meanwhile, over here? We're getting serious. and YOUR name is STILL missing from the list. Tim Scott, Tom Cotton, Ted Cruz, and Kellyanne Conway have already contacted you to sound the alarm--and they are wondering why you haven't checked in yet. This isn't just a formality. It's how we make sure our team is ready to show up, stand strong and win. # [Lessons From Iraq: The Hottest, Deadliest Month of My Life](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=171502891&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNTAyODkxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU3MTg2NTIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODMxMDY1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BhpgyIkr7XQobykUwTI20sQwV-bVMiFMNVj_BDG1FaU)
### Surviving 'Fire Month' in Iraq August 2003.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Aug 20
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=171502891&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNTAyODkxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTcxODY1MiwiZXhwIjoxNzU4MzEwNjUyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.yUIW9qx9I7E_VOvGnd3IkQ7gLzvN1OHrR2ebHnvEejw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=171502891&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNTAyODkxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU3MTg2NTIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODMxMDY1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BhpgyIkr7XQobykUwTI20sQwV-bVMiFMNVj_BDG1FaU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=171502891&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxNTAyODkxLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU3MTg2NTIsImV4cCI6MTc1ODMxMDY1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BhpgyIkr7XQobykUwTI20sQwV-bVMiFMNVj_BDG1FaU)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/lessons-from-iraq-the-hottest-deadliest?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last week I dropped off my daughter Maggie at Clemson--some of you may have read my [substack](https://substack.com/redirect/cd865c0c-9e6c-4752-b202-3f29a338f4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) piece on that. I did all the dad things: carried boxes, helped her set up, took her out to eat, bought merch from the college bookstore, and not embarrass her with too many hugs.
But as we toured the football stadium, dubbed "Death Valley", my mind slipped somewhere else.
Suddenly, I wasn't in South Carolina anymore.
It unlocked a cascade of memories. Unbeknownst to her and her brother, their easy conversations went on without me as my mind drifted back 22 years. First, it made me think of the real Death Valley, in California's Mojave Desert, the hottest place on earth, where summer temperatures regularly peak over 100 degrees. And that association brought me back to the hottest place I ever endured: Living through the[ 135-degree](https://substack.com/redirect/7b8484d5-b19b-4735-8417-817939fd0d52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) inferno of Baghdad, Iraq, while wearing combat gear, and a month of my life that still feels scorched into memory:
## **August 2003. **
We all called it 'Fire Month,' because that was the only way to explain what it felt like to live through it.
Just two months before my deployment, I had been teaching constitutional law at West Point at Thayer Hall, grading finals and wishing my cadets well as they went off into the world. Within weeks, I was in Baghdad with the 82nd Airborne Division, a 29-year-old captain leading a Brigade Operational Law Team (BOLT), suddenly responsible for building a justice system for 1.5 million Iraqis while surviving the most violent month of our deployment.
It was scary. But I knew my duty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbbff66b-ab0c-4634-8653-9bf29821a2f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Me (bottom left) and the BOLT team.
From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Vp-ZKMQkB40T3rSGfKi0hFHhuYnp8jOOD2JNsgALbuQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171502891)
I had two jobs.
First, I was the only lawyer for 3,500 paratroopers prosecuting high-level terrorists, running Article 15s, and trying to build a justice system in a city torn apart.
Secondly, I was leading convoys, dodging Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs), and getting mortared almost nightly at our forward operating base in south central Baghdad.
The conditions were brutal. We didn't really have plumbing. We eventually had Porta-johns (better than the burn pits). They were basically plastic ovens that stank to high heaven. You'd walk in to do your business a little sweaty but leave completely drenched, and if it was a #2, you had to navigate through the flies that would climb from below onto your ass cheeks.
Showers? Maybe weekly. We washed and shaved mostly with water bottles and the rear-view mirrors of our Humvee.
They said our mission was to "win hearts and minds." But it was often just survival.
Did I question why we were there? Absolutely - before, during, and after the deployment. My soldiers did too. But I never ever voiced it. I made sure we were focused on the brutal task at hand. Their morale mattered more than my doubts.
Most of us were in our 20s and 30s, carrying the weight of history on our shoulders. Some carried it home. Some never did.
Our 82nd Airborne Division's second brigade combat team in Iraq, 3,500 strong, lost 19 paratroopers. I personally knew several of them. Some I knew like a brother.
I've kept journals for most of my adult life. When I came home from Clemson, I opened up my Army-issued green book for the first time in over a decade.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0abe2d07-1bae-44a0-82f8-b74bd41de201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What follows is a glimpse at what that hellish month was like. Words from hardly capture it.
* **Aug 1:** Six IEDs exploded in one day. A five-year-old was kidnapped. His parents received a ransom note--and later, his fingers in the mail. PVT Deutch killed by an IED and PFC Lambert killed when he was shot in the head by a stray bullet from celebratory fire 24 hours earlier.
* **Aug 7:** A car bomb at the Jordanian Embassy. Three hundred pounds of explosives. At least eight killed.
* **Aug 8:** PFC Duane Longstreth, on guard duty, died by suicide.
* **Aug 11:** Ten soldiers wounded by IEDs in a single day.
* **Aug 12:** We took another two mortar rounds last night, while another one hit our 1BN FOB.
* **Aug 13:** A group of about 20 of us were briefed by General Marty Dempsey. He gave us three orders: _1\. Finish the fight. 2. Make a positive difference in the lives of the Iraqi people. 3. Take care of your troops._
* **Aug 15:** The Feast of the Assumption. A holy day for Catholics. For me, a day I had to deliver a "solatia" or "consolation payment" of $1,500 to an Iraqi family whose son was mistakenly killed by U.S. fire. Seven direct fire engagements, 5 IEDs in our sector.
* **Aug 19:** UN Embassy up the road in Baghdad bombed. UN Ambassador killed. At least 14 killed.
* **Aug 27:** Our 24-year-old interpreter, Alyaa, fell out of our lead Humvee, as we raced around the traffic circle on the north side of the July 14th bridge. She was scratched up pretty bad, but continued the mission.
* **Aug 29:** Convoy hit by IED, 1 WIA, 4 Iraqis wounded, 1 Iraqi killed. Shrapnel stuck in window, just missing by five inches from decapitating one of our guy's head, small picture of Jesus Christ right there in the corner of the Humvee's window, surrounding the web of broken glass. That same day, a car bomb killed 75 and wounded 300 in Najaf, 100 miles south of Baghdad.
* **Aug 30:** I attended 1 o'clock Mass. A priest from Baghdad just happened to show up--our first since deployment, since we didn't have a Catholic chaplain. In his sermon, he thanked us for being "the hand of mercy." He reminded us how, when troops arrived months earlier, Christians told them to help the Muslims first. In 1991, Christians were forced from their homes up north, leaving everything behind, but they built churches before homes. His optimism and gratitude touched me deeply.
* **Aug 31:** SPC Juan 'RV' Arevalo wins Paratooper of the Quarter. He's excited about the CSM coin & the free dress blues he'll get when he gets home.

So yeah--that month in Iraq was _a lot_. But there were also life-affirming moments that reminded me why I was there.
Late one night that August, I was chatting with Sergeant Sean Scarborough, our Noncommissioned Officer in Charge, who made it home from deployment but is no longer with us. He told me, "Sir, you're different. You actually care. You and RV have love for the Iraqi people. You really are different from most trial counsel. You have compassion." And I was like, "I hope you don't think my compassion stops me from crushing someone in an instant."
"No, Sir, that's what's so cool about it."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d4e6da0-bc85-44a7-9452-964af6ed9f80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Me consulting the Iraqi police force.
***
## **Lessons Learned**
1. **Embrace the Suck.** The heat hit 135 degrees. Discipline is more important than motivation. Lead with love and find a way to laugh.
2. **Cherish Your Loved Ones.** You might not see them tomorrow. You never know when you're time is up. Make it count every day.
3. **Enjoy the Simple Things.** The way a bottle of cold water could taste like heaven. The way a laugh could keep you sane. Hot showers. Toilets without flies. Hot meals. Friends that won't be taken from you suddenly on a normal basis.

These are the things I was thinking about while bringing my daughter to college and reflecting on now. I'm also thinking about how proud I am that she's entering her own journey as part of the warrior class. The road for her or any of our young Americans willing to sacrifice it all will never be easy. But thank God we have people like them who love our nation with a servant's heart.
In three weeks, this upcoming 9/11 (24 years later!) I'll be standing tall at the George W. Bush Presidential Library in Dallas alongside veteran leaders across this nation, including my friend "RV"--the paratrooper of the quarter I once encouraged to apply to West Point late one night in Baghdad. He went on marry a classmate and become a Texas Ranger, a lawyer and father.
From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

-- Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. -- Patrick The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter. You 're currently a free subscriber to From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy. For the full experience, upgrade your subscription. Annual paid subscribers will receive a signed copy of my 2008 memoir, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Patrick J. Murphy ? ?

You might’ve heard the news already: If California’s new map is passed, I’ll be running for reelection in the new 42nd District – a much redder, tougher district than my current one.

Washington Republicans know that a majority of Americans don’t want their dangerous, radical agenda. That’s why they’re trying to rig the next election through redistricting, changing the rules so they can continue to fight for big corporations and special interests instead of everyday people like us.
And that’s why here in California, we’re ready to punch back – even harder. We will not sit back and let them get away with their power grab.
**[I’m ready to run for reelection in a tougher district as part of that fight. Are you with me?Endorse our campaign today to tell Republicans that we will not be silenced.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113686134/564587932/1090045402?refcode=250820_RG_fight-PET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjU2YmZjNy1mYzdkLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4XEyJOtqTXzgnk7B4N-byaD-G-5ubWefWX2MO70L8u4=&emci=7bf4c1c1-fc7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=1656bfc7-fc7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=16877361)**

Robert Garcia

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Honor those who gave so much—show up on Aug 23rd
body:
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/byrINEG-QpQiVSXaFNgVB-XmsbARk4Xl1mAYqTyvZWA=419)Patriot–The SAVE Act is a crucial election-integrity bill. That’s why, as you know, we’ve designated August as **Only Citizens Vote Month** —because this bill closes the loopholes in current law that allow noncitizens to register and vote.We’re asking you to help in a simple, concrete way: **host or join a sign-waving on Saturday, August 23rd.** We know August is hot. And we also know that our forefathers and service members who built and defended this country carried far heavier burdens than anything we’re asking today. We’re not comparing our effort to theirs—we’re honoring it. **A small act of citizenship, done faithfully, keeps their work alive.** Even **30 minutes** on a busy corner—especially in the cooler morning—can reach hundreds of neighbors with a clear message: only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections. Bring a friend. Bring water. Be the patriot who makes the difference in your community.**Will you be part of the sign-waving day?**[_**Sign up today and let me know!**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonly-citizens-vote-month%2F/1/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/4X2BTvZDBd2d7kYD2QjgDocb0lJKrqvcKXRQeAqqK54=419) If you can do more than 30 minutes, great. If all you have is 20, we’re grateful. Every person counts, and so does your time.And remember, please forward this to two friends who share your values and invite them to stand with you—whether that means attending your event or organizing one in their communities.
Thank you for all you do!Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/MgsvEUTh8VpsH5oFBS0VXnr1mmlX2nSKn2xK1BSfN5o=419) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/mJHrL9Z3Ww2W_Tk_yuPJ1tlmNBZW_RtZqGOc2fiavlk=419)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/M1XtXaTNpN4TwPzT6IetuN69D7mXIv0p8qmLPbofN7I=419) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/01000198c90437da-87d718b1-0524-4588-b0c5-082bc96c2e31-000000/0cBS1xxV818gsrE2b1rDMxEPferHRklzmz2WUPs8fDc=419).

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/20/2025
body:
America’s election system is broken—and the regime desperately wants it that way
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Secretary of State Jena Griswold [vowed to defend Colorado’s mail-in voting system](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), casting it as a target of Trump’s America First agenda. Gov. Polis signed an AI bill he admitted could [curb innovation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), raising concerns about competitiveness. [Proposed insurance fee hikes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) are fueling fears of a worsening affordability crisis. And in Mesa County, Tina Peters’ nine-year prison sentence has reignited debate over election integrity and whether [justice is being politicized](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** President Trump is setting the stage for [possible Putin–Zelensky talks](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a bid to advance peace in Ukraine while also pushing to [exclude illegal immigrants from the census](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to restore fair apportionment. Meanwhile, new HHS data show the Biden administration placed over [10,000 unaccompanied migrant children with unvetted sponsors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), intensifying scrutiny of border policy.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Writers argue America’s election system is [deliberately broken](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), propped up by elites exploiting chaos; warn that seminaries have traded [biblical truth for grievance ideology](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.); and highlight how New Era Colorado is using the budget crisis to [push higher taxes and undermine TABOR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, August 20, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[When watchdogs reached out, only two clerks answered: Colorado’s election crisis exposed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BILL LEHMAN & HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado’s election system is facing a crisis of confidence, with voters increasingly skeptical due to incidents like [Arapahoe County’s mishandled 2020 Cast Vote Record](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and the [Secretary of State’s office leaking 600 BIOS passwords during the 2024 election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Leaking 600 BIOS passwords is the civic version of leaving the house key under the doormat and then posting a photo of the doormat.
These failures, alongside persistent reports of irregularities, undermine the narrative that Colorado is an election [“gold standard.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[Public trust continues to erode](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as evidence of vulnerabilities mounts, yet one county’s efforts illustrate how clerks can make important improvements—though systemic issues demand far broader action.
In late May 2025, the Colorado Institute for Fair Elections (COIFFE), a nonpartisan volunteer group, wrote to every clerk and recorder in all 64 counties. The ask was simple: meet, walk through five critical weaknesses, and talk solutions...
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[The math doesn’t lie: America’s election system is broken—and the regime desperately wants it that way](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Garbo's commentary argues America’s election system is rigged by a corrupt regime, pointing to 2020 irregularities like vote spikes, blocked audits, and manipulated voting machines as coordinated efforts to preserve power.
* It claims mail-in ballots and electronic machines destroyed transparency, while investigations were suppressed by courts, media, and federal agencies—turning elections into a tool for regime protection.
* He calls for urgent reform before 2026: in-person voting with ID, paper ballots, full transparency, and strict fraud penalties, warning that without change, fair elections may never return.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[New Era Colorado exploits budget crisis to push higher taxes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Progressive group New Era Colorado is leveraging the state’s budget crisis to push for a graduated income tax, framing it as the solution to affordability issues.
* Critics warn this campaign preys on younger and less-informed voters, using fear and misinformation to undermine TABOR and justify higher taxes.
* The real issue, the piece argues, isn’t TABOR but Colorado’s political class overspending, with the bill for their fiscal “wizardry” now coming due.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[From gospel to grievance: How seminaries traded truth for ideology](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 19** _There was a time when seminaries existed to train ministers of the gospel — men and women who would handle the Scriptures carefully, shepherd congregations faithfully, and proclaim salvation through Christ alone. But over the past century, many of America’s most prominent seminaries have undergone a quiet yet radical transformation._
__

**[Griswold rallies Indivisible activists with anti-Trump speech while overseeing Colorado elections](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN & SHAINA COLE | STATE | AUGUST 18** _When Larimer County resident Phoebe McWilliams tuned into an Indivisible Colorado Zoom call on August 6, she expected to hear an update on election policy. Instead, she heard Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold accuse President Donald Trump of “abusing our legal system and undermining the Constitution almost every single day” and rally activists to “stop Trump in the courts, mobilize and beat MAGA."_
__

**[Potholes and Broken Promises: Colorado’s Working Class Deserves Better](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 18** _Drive a mile in Colorado and you’ll know the truth: our roads are crumbling, and so is the promise that the government would take care of this basic function. Families scrape by to keep their cars running while the same political elite who’ve run this state for twenty years pour billions into pet projects and leave working people holding the bill._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---

|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "To live under the American Constitution is the greatest political privilege that was ever accorded to the human race." – Calvin Coolidge

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, the GOP-led Senate left for a month-long break after passing one of the most shameful pieces of legislation I’ve ever seen.
Their budget bill will strip millions of their health care and cause health insurance premiums to skyrocket – all to fund a massive tax cut for the special interests and billionaires who fund their campaigns.
Meanwhile, Trump’s tariffs are pushing up prices everywhere you look. The GOP has added more than $4 trillion to the national debt. **And now, Republicans are working to gerrymander districts before the midterms so they won’t have to face voters and the consequences of their disastrous agenda.**
I’m using every lever of power I have to fight back against Donald Trump, the GOP-led Senate, and their dangerous policies. But to do my job well, I need to hear from folks like you directly about your top priorities and concerns.
**With the Senate out of session this month, I’m traveling around the state to talk with folks about what’s top of mind for them right now – and I want to make sure I hear from _you_ , too.**
[**That’s why I asked my team to put together a brief priorities survey so you can share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly. Will you take a moment now to let me know what is weighing heaviest on your mind?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113687429/564592657/391917200?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5575-su-nd&refcode=jtk5575-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGMxMzc0MC0wMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YAuDGsiNToyLSVi8wp0pwvHetRaHP6v_ErWnXzQP68=&emci=9c9e4f8f-5279-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdc13740-007e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=1586379)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113687434/564592660/391917200?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5575-su-nd&refcode=jtk5575-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGMxMzc0MC0wMDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4YAuDGsiNToyLSVi8wp0pwvHetRaHP6v_ErWnXzQP68=&emci=9c9e4f8f-5279-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fdc13740-007e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=1586379)
---
I’m grateful to have you with me in this fight. Thanks for taking a moment to share your feedback.
Sincerely,

Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: EMILYs List endorsed our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=632%2E181023%2Epfrk-E)
Hello,
**EMILYs List has stood with my campaign since Day 1.**
EMILYs List is the nation’s largest resource for women in politics, dedicated to electing pro-choice Democratic women who will protect our rights and fight for equality. Their support means we have the strength of a national movement standing with us, and I couldn’t be more proud to join their ranks.
This endorsement isn’t just about me. **It’s about building a Michigan where every woman can live, work, raise a family, and thrive — with the freedom to make her own health care decisions. It’s about protecting the democracy we’ve fought so hard for. It’s about making Michigan the best place to call home for**** _everyone_****in the next generation.**
The truth is, our rights are on the line right now. Anti-choice extremists are mobilizing across the country. But with you — and with EMILYs List — we can win this fight and keep moving Michigan forward.
**[**Will you make a contribution today to help us turn this endorsement into the momentum we need to win?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=632%2E181023%2Epfrk-E)**

name: All On The Line
subject: Let’s talk about Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Extremist partisan forces are in this fight for the long haul. So are we — with your support.
|
---

Peter,
Perhaps no state better demonstrates the extreme unfairness of partisan gerrymandering than Ohio.
It wasn’t long ago that Ohio was considered the battleground state. President Obama won there in both 2008 and 2012 — but today, the state is represented in Congress by 10 Republicans and just five Democrats.
And now, state lawmakers have set their sights on Ohio to make the state even more gerrymandered with a redraw this fall — they could attempt to flip as many as three more seats.
This kind of system-rigging doesn’t happen overnight. It took years for extreme partisan interests to tip the scales in their favor, using every avenue and skirting laws and norms in the process. They’re in it for the long haul, and we must be too.
**All On The Line will always fight for fair maps, no matter how difficult the path to victory. Sometimes this journey is two steps forward, one step back. But we know that the vast majority of Americans stand for fairness — and that’s why we need you with us.**
[**Donate today to support All On The Line’s dogged efforts to fight until we have fair maps in all 50 states. Your donation will fund grassroots efforts to build power at the grassroots level and push back against anti-democracy power grabs.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113688378/564595656/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHGerryHist_email_20250820-AOTL-Tier1-OHGerryHist_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250820-AOTL-Tier1-OHGerryHist_&utm_campaign=OHGerryHist&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZmNlMDU1LTAyN2UtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDIzZSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pdNNxJGh4MJKQ_5jFgf0vUO3MI03j_PGTYc37TjHu6A=)

Here’s a quick primer on how Ohio became a laboratory for partisan gerrymandering:
**• November 2015:** Ohio voters overwhelmingly pass a constitutional amendment to create the Ohio Redistricting Commission, which was intended to bring fairness into the process of creating electoral maps.
**• September 2021:** An entirely partisan Ohio Redistricting Commission proposes gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps, which then get struck down by the Ohio Supreme Court.
**• January 2022:** Politicians pass a second set of gerrymandered state legislative maps, which get struck down by the courts again.
**• February 2022:** Undeterred, politicians pass a third set of state legislative maps. The courts strike them down and order Ohio to hire independent map drawers.
**• March 2022:** Politicians hire independent map drawers but ignore their work and plow ahead with their unconstitutional state legislative maps. Meanwhile, the politicians also passed another gerrymandered congressional map with only limited changes from the previous invalidated one.
**• November 2022:** Ohio elections officials use the unfair, unconstitutional maps in the midterm elections.
Because the congressional map in Ohio was passed on a purely partisan basis, it expires before the next election under a special state constitutional provision, and the Ohio Redistricting Commission must go back to work. That’s why some politicians today are dreaming that Ohio could be tipped 13-2 for Republicans in 2026.
It may seem like these extreme shifts in power happen overnight. But we know the truth: This has been a long game played by extreme partisan forces working behind the scenes and pulling every lever at their disposal.
**Extremists think that they can get away with this illegal, unconstitutional gerrymandering. But that’s why All On The Line exists — to call out and fight back against these blatant attempts to seize unchecked power and silence the will of the voters.**

So are we — with your support. | Peter, Perhaps no state better demonstrates the extreme unfairness of partisan gerrymandering than Ohio. It wasn’t long ago that Ohio was considered the battleground state. President Obama won there in both 2008 and 2012 — but today, the state is represented in Congress by 10 Republicans and just five Democrats. And now, state lawmakers have set their sights on Ohio to make the state even more gerrymandered with a redraw this fall — they could attempt to flip as many as three more seats. This kind of system-rigging doesn’t happen overnight. It took years for extreme partisan interests to tip the scales in their favor, using every avenue and skirting laws and norms in the process. They’re in it for the long haul, and we must be too. All On The Line will always fight for fair maps, no matter how difficult the path to victory. | Peter,

I want to make sure you know exactly what’s at stake. So here are 3 things you need to know:

**1️⃣ ****Trump and the GOP are targeting California.** Yes, even here. Republicans only need a handful of seats to keep control of the House, and they’re spending big in blue states to protect their grip on power.

**2️⃣ ****I’m leading BOLD PAC to flip the House.** As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m helping elect diverse, progressive Democrats nationwide, but the road ahead is far from easy.

**3️⃣ ****We can’t do it without grassroots power.** MAGA megadonors are flooding key races with cash. But we have grassroots supporters who believe in a fairer, more just future.

So here are 3 things you need to know: 1️⃣ Trump and the GOP are targeting California. Yes, even here. Republicans only need a handful of seats to keep control of the House, and they’re spending big in blue states to protect their grip on power. 2️⃣ I’m leading BOLD PAC to flip the House. As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m helping elect diverse, progressive Democrats nationwide, but the road ahead is far from easy. 3️⃣ We can’t do it without grassroots power. Fellow Conservative,

You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most.

But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you.

I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over.

Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash.

And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative.

clean_body: There’s one final step before this campaign can go live. | | | Friend, President Trump has endorsed his candidate. I’m behind him 100%. But before we take this fight to the next level, You were chosen for a reason. You’ve stood tall before – and we’re counting on you to do it again. Because while the public doesn’t know it yet, the Liberal Cabal is already lining up to sabotage this campaign from day one. They fear this endorsement. They fear this candidate. And if they had their way, your voice would never be heard. Prove them wrong. Let’s send a message they can’t ignore. – JD Vance Vice President of the United States | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

name: Team Warner
subject: Turning the tide on Trump’s trifecta
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We know you agree: We must take back the Senate AND House to hold Trump accountable for his corruption and put a check on his dangerous agenda.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689063/564597751/-898473419?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=) Derek, this is a long but important email detailing our strategy to win this seat, help Democrats across the Commonwealth, and take back both the Senate and House from Trump’s acolytes.

We hope you’ll take a minute to read it, but if you’re short on time we’ll skip straight to the point: [_**Your investment in our campaign today is a critical component of our strategy to hold this seat and make important inroads for Democrats in historically red parts of the Commonwealth. Can we count on your support right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689064/564597752/-898473419?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=) ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689065/564597753/-898473419?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=)**** We know you agree:

**We must take back the Senate AND House to hold Trump accountable for his corruption and put a check on his dangerous agenda.**

But did you know Virginia plays a critical role in both those efforts? First and foremost, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.

We’ve got to protect every seat we currently hold if we want any chance of taking back the majority. Republican leadership has directly called out Virginia as an opportunity to _expand_ their Senate majority. And we all know how desperate Trump is to hold onto his majority in the House.

He’s pressuring Republican-controlled states like Texas and Indiana to gerrymander their Congressional maps to bypass the will of voters and hold on to power.

But Virginia is home to FIVE potential flip opportunities for Democrats – enough to take back the House. **Our team isn’t just focused on building a campaign strong enough to reelect Mark Warner – we’re laying the foundation to help congressional Democrats in key swing districts _and_ historically red districts:**
* Our strategy relies on making unprecedented, early investments in our digital infrastructure to reach voters in all corners of the digital ecosystem.
* Senator Warner has always maintained strong relationships with communities and leaders in all corners of Virginia and prioritized a rigorous travel schedule to meet with voters and constituents. In the coming months, he’ll ramp up his travel even further and hold events all across Virginia.
* There’s no winning Virginia without turning out young voters. Our campaign has already invested in a campus fellowship program to spearhead our outreach to college-aged voters.

[_**It’s not enough to win. We’ve got to win big across the Commonwealth and help Democrats make historic inroads to take back the House. Will you make an early investment into the unprecedented campaign infrastructure we’re building with a donation of $26 today? Your donation will not just help us hold this senate seat – it will allow us to build a winning infrastructure for Democrats across Virginia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689066/564597754/-898473419?amount=26&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=) ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689067/564597755/-898473419?amount=26&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=)**** Thank you,

Team Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113689068/564597756/-898473419?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WinningBig_250820_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTEwNzc5Ni0wNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9p0PbwPymTA0yaZMplKyVAxuZ5THNwE7tN6yeeXF47M=)****

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Trump is coming after our ballots. Here’s what we know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITcQm-QY0Q_uWoKabBDGmTV1tUSFcyWWA6fYGcG0fqdL6KK_dFkWbH4JgyU_04AnlDMKY0KvMEQtRC7Y-2-UipyGlXdqPM-Io9PRHEoRZCpsFycr-Cv4tKzF-aiILAbdDimmzoc8HqFvCrYCEINmyPlcToG5S7uBhfXgMtQla45B7SvKp7G_E2MrrLjkdhApp4S0YRbGumlj_3loZ9LQYPG_cz_87dcO8WhV2_oQFl9y4/4j7/cPY15cZjRgexctFIl6K1ZQ/h0/h001.3G1QM2QHLIOk_nJNc6jkjYuzwjZsa87Ms27yOQMB3Zw)
---
Peter,

Donald Trump just announced he's going to ban mail-in voting across the country. Stop and think about that for a second. Wherever you're registered to vote in the country, that means no more absentee voting for your grandparents who are homebound or your spouse who's deployed overseas with the military.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUC54pbUkVc9YFbrlQZhQpmDJOPUCwbGsC3LWT-Y7uyV_7mMBDpLUwxeijIFIWlOKwlfOoQt-keaaetj6ptzfqX_03CwVPfIIBFsVKI6ltKt0oFG5VtqTIqahQduX4GXfi1MH3yvEbxdLtLwjq41VB7hIL4HGbFR5qm13-XbgwqWxQdnpPv0D_0HEGmVKwSThjJFFDwUfRy9VF6nuOBlEYSWJjDMHpWr44fPg2hXqQf16cfVGLZQaMBRVQU4Vi2JzIIDwn1veeoGmx1hSTayc-HMxyQWCTI0-tBQVv9NY_fCvDiNjehSrc4ExPkP_LqA0oqHGQYB5UTi-TerpwoeJKh5/4j7/cPY15cZjRgexctFIl6K1ZQ/h1/h001.0XlG49o-HGbTV1SyfuIakI9ptyx9AMfl3iATevS1wz4)
---
But here in Washington state, it's an even bigger deal. We've been an all-vote-by-mail state for nearly 15 years. What would a mandate like this do to an all mail voting state like ours? Would Trump claim the power to toss our votes out? Would anyone stop him? Trump is claiming states have to follow his orders because they're "agents of the federal government." That's not how the Constitution works, but Trump would never let something like the law get in the way of his authoritarian agenda. The chaos that would come from an executive order like this is so dangerous it is unfathomable. It is literally a recipe for stealing elections. And this attack on our voting rights doesn't stop with banning mail-in ballots. This is about **sowing doubt** , undermining trust in our democratic institutions, and creating chaos so elections can be contested at will. Washington, Oregon, Colorado - all vote-by-mail states - would likely resist, but then what? A constitutional standoff with the White House. A divided Congress. A nation pushed to the breaking point. This is the ultimate test of our democracy. Will the courts move fast enough to stop it? Will Congress find the backbone to stand firm? Or will Trump's allies exploit confusion to throw the election into chaos? Every attack we ignore moves us closer to a system where laws don't matter and elections don't count - where power is the only thing that matters. This is a five alarm fire for democracy that puts everything and everyone we love at risk. And once again our current congresswoman has nothing to say about it. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez hasn't issued a single press release, social media statement, constituent update - nothing to tell the voters of WA-03 what is at risk right now. But the one thing she DID do this year was vote for MAGA's SAVE Act, a voter suppression bill that directly attacks the voting rights of married women. [**We can 't afford to stay quiet. I'm running to fight for every Washingtonian's right to have their ballot counted. But that fight takes resources, and I need your support. clean_body: | | Peter, Donald Trump just announced he's going to ban mail-in voting across the country. Stop and think about that for a second. Wherever you're registered to vote in the country, that means no more absentee voting for your grandparents who are homebound or your spouse who's deployed overseas with the military. | But here in Washington state, it's an even bigger deal. We've been an all-vote-by-mail state for nearly 15 years. What would a mandate like this do to an all mail voting state like ours? Would Trump claim the power to toss our votes out? Would anyone stop him? Trump is claiming states have to follow his orders because they're "agents of the federal government." That's not how the Constitution works, but Trump would never let something like the law get in the way of his authoritarian agenda. The chaos that would come from an executive order like this is so dangerous it is unfathomable. It is literally a recipe for stealing elections. And this attack on our voting rights doesn't stop with banning mail-in ballots. This is about sowing doubt , undermining trust in our democratic institutions, and creating chaos so elections can be contested at will. Washington, Oregon, Colorado - all vote-by-mail states - would likely resist, but then what? A constitutional standoff with the White House. A divided Congress. A nation pushed to the breaking point. This is the ultimate test of our democracy. Will the courts move fast enough to stop it? Will Congress find the backbone to stand firm? Or will Trump's allies exploit confusion to throw the election into chaos? Every attack we ignore moves us closer to a system where laws don't matter and elections don't count - where power is the only thing that matters. This is a five alarm fire for democracy that puts everything and everyone we love at risk. And once again our current congresswoman has nothing to say about it. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez hasn't issued a single press release, social media statement, constituent update - nothing to tell the voters of WA-03 what is at risk right now. But the one thing she DID do this year was vote for MAGA's SAVE Act, a voter suppression bill that directly attacks the voting rights of married women. If we don't stand up now, we may not get another chance. Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich | Quick note about upcoming events for those in the area: Tuesday September 2nd Brent will be a guest at Drinking Liberally Vancouver candidate Q&A forum. Brent will be answering direct questions from those in attendance. Event starts at 6PM arrive early to order food and drinks. We know there has been a lot happening in the news lately, so we wanted to check in. From Trump’s power grab in Texas to Schweikert’s vote to gut Medicaid, there are a lot of issues to keep our eyes on. Marlene wants to see how her top supporters are feeling and learn more about which issues are impacting you all the most. She’s looking forward to reading each and every response. **[_So will you take our survey and let us know what’s on your mind? Vice President JD Vance, speaking at Union Station Wednesday, laughed in the faces of protesters and hecklers as he and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth visited with National Guard troops deployed to make Washington D.C. safe again.
Vance **[shot back at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/9c335fcd-d741-40c2-a432-33d92c66c35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who challenged him for evidence that D.C. has a crime problem.
"Just look around!" Vance fired back. "Obviously D.C. has a terrible crime problem!!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6e1d89c4-f656-4852-bd70-f36b5922b181?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9c335fcd-d741-40c2-a432-33d92c66c35e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Vance told reporters that troops are having "really substantial effects"** tackling crime including vagrants, drug addicts, and mentally ill individuals who "harass, threaten violence, and attack families."

* **Trump administration signals possible extension beyond 30-day federal police takeover** \- While the 1973 Home Rule Act permits temporary federal control of Metropolitan Police for 30 days, Vance said Trump will "reevaluate" progress and extend the order "if he thinks he has to extend his order to ensure that people have access to public safety."

# WATCH Vance meet with the troops in Union Station as protesters loose their freaking minds!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/73855176-0cb7-478e-b24f-daf4d09137e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/73855176-0cb7-478e-b24f-daf4d09137e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **1,300 National Guard troops from seven states deployed to Washington** \- In addition to D.C. National Guard, troops from Ohio, West Virginia, South Carolina, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Tennessee are participating in the federal crackdown, with no Home Rule Act limitations on National Guard deployment duration.
* **D.C. officials file lawsuit challenging federal police takeover** \- Washington D.C. Attorney General Brian Schwalb sued the Trump administration Friday, calling the police federalization "illegal" and "the gravest threat to Home Rule DC has ever faced," arguing the administration is "abusing its temporary, limited authority under the law."

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: don’t scroll yet

body:

Peter — I want to share some of what we’re planning for here in NC. **National Republican groups are preparing to make this the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. And as the race gets off the ground, the GOP has the upper hand.** Republican mega-donor groups recently reported _massive_ fundraising hauls — outpacing those of groups aligned with Democrats. **[You can help take them on by making a grassroots donation to help Roy Cooper win >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113690911/564604011/-1743631236?refcode=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmYzEyMS0wYjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xDaGcYqr16zAoeFiqavm3LKP-82GMs3Sn5wOmcAYjs=)** Here’s what you need to know: North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, and the path to the Senate majority runs through it. Republicans will go to any lengths to defeat us, and we need to be prepared for a long, expensive fight. Roy has won some of the toughest races in NC before, and we have what it takes to do it again — because we have you on our team. **[Peter, pitching in just $5 today will help take on the GOP’s mega-donors and flip this Senate seat from red to blue. Can we count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113690912/564604012/-1743631236?amount=5&refcode=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmYzEyMS0wYjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xDaGcYqr16zAoeFiqavm3LKP-82GMs3Sn5wOmcAYjs=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113690913/564604013/-1743631236?refcode=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ms=ea.6fffc121-0b7e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmZmYzEyMS0wYjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xDaGcYqr16zAoeFiqavm3LKP-82GMs3Sn5wOmcAYjs=)

* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

clean_body: We need your help to fight back. | Peter — I want to share some of what we’re planning for here in NC. National Republican groups are preparing to make this the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. And as the race gets off the ground, the GOP has the upper hand. Republican mega-donor groups recently reported massive fundraising hauls — outpacing those of groups aligned with Democrats. = Here’s what you need to know: North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, and the path to the Senate majority runs through it. Republicans will go to any lengths to defeat us, and we need to be prepared for a long, expensive fight. Roy has won some of the toughest races in NC before, and we have what it takes to do it again — because we have you on our team. = | = We’re grateful that you’re with us, Jeff Allen Campaign Manager Cooper for North Carolina Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Urges Supreme Court to Keep Fifth Circuit Ban on Counting Ballots Received After Election Day
body:
Judicial Watch announced that, on behalf of the Libertarian Party of
Mississippi, it filed a brief to the Supreme Court of the United
States that opposes the State of Mississippi’s attempt to
overturn the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit’s
decision, which struck down a law allowing ballots received after
Election Day to be counted (Michael Watson, Mississippi Secretary of
State v. Republican National Committee, et al.,(No. 24-1260)).

clean_body: I'm not a slave, I'm not a servant. I'm a free-thinking American | Peter, All my life, I've had to deal with Liberal Elites trying to tell me what to think. Whether it was about my battle with mental health or my politics, the Industrial Media Complex cannot accept the fact that I'm a free-thinking black athlete. The liberal media thinks that I should be bound by chains and shackles to the Democratic Party just because I'm black. They think I have no place in the America-First Movement supporting Donald Trump and running for Senate in Minnesota. They said the same thing when I ran against one of the most Radical, Anti-American Socialists, Ilhan Omar, in 2022 and Amy Klobuchar in 2024. I won't let them win again. As of today, I'm losing this race for Minnesota's next United States Senator. The Democrats have all the money, resources, and manpower to crush my campaign with countless attack ads. They are laughing at me. We're closing in on the MAJOR AUGUST deadline of 2025, and soon enough, we will report our numbers. I'll either win or lose in the coming hours. I hate asking like this, but it's all I can do at this point. | I hope you can understand, and I hope you help. Thank you, and God Bless, Royce White PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=dGaqdYIuRNxknzc9Qn9E3DwR04XGO5tcF7QGPzYOG4obrXFY0PLr%2Fi5aD7STgVgfmhoLdy%2FCMp7fc2TGhO9BW25Td%2FJhi8NEWcaOrCUb0Q0wll%2BIQ4uZcJMS%2F01wZywqLPA%2FE%2B37J19kgH2rWp1tPTZL%2BoCRyabzm6MEYZzkOTJi2fI61h8HAvjy0ehAchbVE318flqS1KJBgawg1gglaAzC3C0UY3QtQNNsk9gBNINOW2ycQsKgopNVSsXjm6gqH61B0eea2vZckL152JXqxEQVv9bwBG%2BYdk7DQZPxG0fsrksozduk9wfMukr8oUYCVIyXTLFP2IaCsptUecqRkZV6bQp2Pw%2FnyLZ1Qc5nmWbm6LCmNUoc5Ni4oYBZR821c%2FDHBKynBJFrpjA08uBPlX9IPKRfu9fIv%2F7bQHRWukw%3D)

Right now, over **38,000** people in New Mexico’s 2nd district are at risk of losing their Medicaid coverage. And across the state of New Mexico, it’s more than **100,000.** These are our neighbors, our elders, and our kids. Families who’ve counted on this care, and are now being told: **you’re on your own.** I heard from a mom raising a child with special needs, terrified of what would happen if her coverage disappears. And I spoke to a private cardiology clinic in Carlsbad that’s barely breaking even. They’re trying to serve patients who have nowhere else to go. **Life and death shouldn’t be up for debate.** Donald Trump and Republicans are out there pushing an extreme economic agenda that puts billionaires first and leaves working families behind. They’ve gutted Medicaid, given handouts to the rich, and called it “America First” — while our communities pay the price. Let me be clear: **It doesn’t have to be like this.** We can — and must — build a system where no one has to wonder whether they can afford to take their child to the doctor. Where small clinics in rural towns don’t have to shut down. Where healthcare is within reach for **everyone, not just those at the top.** That’s what I’m fighting for. But I can’t do it alone. [Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us build a campaign that puts our communities and their access to healthcare first — and puts the communities of southern New Mexico first before politics?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113691372/564605496/-2084511163?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_082025_MEDICAID_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjk3NjZmYi0wYzdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Qy0sf9Xp9B1x0g8BKWavtiL47wpS_JL3C5AbJ8BMfA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Right now, over 38,000 people in New Mexico’s 2nd district are at risk of losing their Medicaid coverage. And across the state of New Mexico, it’s more than 100,000. These are our neighbors, our elders, and our kids. Families who’ve counted on this care, and are now being told: you’re on your own. I heard from a mom raising a child with special needs, terrified of what would happen if her coverage disappears. And I spoke to a private cardiology clinic in Carlsbad that’s barely breaking even. They’re trying to serve patients who have nowhere else to go. Life and death shouldn’t be up for debate. Donald Trump and Republicans are out there pushing an extreme economic agenda that puts billionaires first and leaves working families behind. They’ve gutted Medicaid, given handouts to the rich, and called it “America First” — while our communities pay the price. Let me be clear: It doesn’t have to be like this. We can — and must — build a system where no one has to wonder whether they can afford to take their child to the doctor. Where small clinics in rural towns don’t have to shut down. Where healthcare is within reach for everyone, not just those at the top. That’s what I’m fighting for. But I can’t do it alone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email]
Team – Jena was on CNN to discuss Trump’s claims that he will ban mail ballots before the 2026 election. Watch her interview here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email]
Trump may make baseless claims, but he will not be successful in eliminating vote-by-mail. Jena has taken him and his misinformation on since 2020, when he intensified his lies about our election systems.
His claims are not about security - they are about a weak president grasping at straws to keep him and his followers in power, no matter what. Jena made one thing clear: States oversee elections, the president does not. And we need to fight back against this fear-mongering extremism.
Jena is running for Attorney General to protect the rights of Coloradans. We will challenge and beat any unconstitutional attempt to disenfranchise millions of Americans. Watch Jena’s full interview on CNN and chip in now to help power her campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg-cnn?refcode=250820-email]
Thanks,
Team Jena

The fight to protect our democracy from Republican gerrymandering is just beginning, and we launched our **Dems on Redistricting Offensive** to give Democrats the upper hand to fight fire with fire on redistricting now and in 2030. **The Dems on Redistricting Offensive is helping fund the fight to put the party on offense by winning Democratic majorities in state legislatures.** [Will you join the DLCC’s movement by making an urgent donation today? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCduiCcnVmD_M2PyqTzEHCT53yACs3MyxWXsq5Q5uvw_Cm-rUiBhQERdVzNnbWoSLMJuBwyQdjFBDZZ0WtoMcFZ8G3osf6x9E17KGkTdgI00QIfe2VQ5tjlabsyF_p_P5HckmhC5Ah9rNVzw8q6ofkimmByVDYn-vAuNp5iAAqZhsAesNmhRgLfzfMyu9_JerpXLNLaZ-KJobI89lUgsswFN5TPfbjRroqbAALkugURcovOBVe3TuvZVpvQcXgptVXst3at04wIip5wJrKbQNAAhYKHpRcH6Txb_tyVDJHFY8RR4_U3w8MFkfH1-yMwo4biHxhxatWz-PPYX_ieXInQ_y5iZ9J47rp9Ql5eoCUymxl-6Jj3hu8Or1OkaJuGXxdUL61rVzNfbuXn6gdd-e7CEp3H2Ru8sazeJRpUOcpsbJ9/4j7/NXaZ6iLKTk2MRsGQJMTO5Q/h0/h001.ysMuGVif5ICrfwaiP2KuyTe1iYbRMbEQN_qrZtONk8Y) Texas Governor Greg Abbott has made it clear why he is looking to rig the maps in the GOP’s favor: **because Trump told him to.** And Republicans in other red states like Missouri and Florida are likely following suit. Republicans at the state level have proven time and again that they are more concerned with kissing the ring than representing their constituents. As Texas state Democrats bring the fight back home, California Democrats have introduced plans for new maps to counter Republican gerrymandering. Democrats across the country will leave no stone unturned to protect voters and our elections. **Democrats won’t back down, but we must build power in state legislatures nationwide _now_ to keep it up.** [Protecting and expanding Democratic control of state legislatures is paramount to protecting our democracy from Republican gerrymandering. clean_body: The DLCC’s Dems on Redistricting Offensive is helping fund the fight to put the party on offense by winning Democratic majorities in state legislatures. Will you join the DLCC’s movement? | | | | | ---|--- The fight to protect our democracy from Republican gerrymandering is just beginning, and we launched our Dems on Redistricting Offensive to give Democrats the upper hand to fight fire with fire on redistricting now and in 2030. The Dems on Redistricting Offensive is helping fund the fight to put the party on offense by winning Democratic majorities in state legislatures. Texas Governor Greg Abbott has made it clear why he is looking to rig the maps in the GOP’s favor: because Trump told him to. And Republicans in other red states like Missouri and Florida are likely following suit. Republicans at the state level have proven time and again that they are more concerned with kissing the ring than representing their constituents. As Texas state Democrats bring the fight back home, California Democrats have introduced plans for new maps to counter Republican gerrymandering. Democrats across the country will leave no stone unturned to protect voters and our elections. Democrats won’t back down, but we must build power in state legislatures nationwide now to keep it up. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Deb Haaland
subject: What my grandparents taught me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’ve carried that sense of duty throughout every chapter of my life.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3922%2E400544%2Eiwrg_v)
My grandparents taught me to be a good steward of the Earth — to care for our land, wildlife, and natural resources – not just for ourselves, but for generations to come. I’ve carried that sense of duty throughout every chapter of my life.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250820_1_climate?amount=5&refcode=em20250820-3922&refcode2=3922_400544_iwrg_v&akid=3922%2E400544%2Eiwrg_v)
In Congress, I fought to protect sacred lands, backed the Green New Deal, and stood up to fossil fuel lobbyists who put profits over people.
I’m proud that in my tenure as Secretary of the Interior, we helped protect more lands and waters than any administration in U.S. history while also creating good jobs in clean energy, conservation, and cleaning up legacy pollution.
**But now all of that progress is at risk.**
Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have worked to gut environmental protections and sell off public lands — all while New Mexico stands on the front lines of the devastating impacts of climate change.
Governors are a critical line of defense against the Trump agenda, especially when it comes to standing up against the brazen attacks on our environment. **And as governor, I will be a fierce defender of our home, but I can’t win this race on my own.**
Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you.
**[So I'm asking: Will you chip in $5 today to help power our climate-first campaign and protect New Mexico's land, water, and future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250820_1_climate?amount=5&refcode=em20250820-3922&refcode2=3922_400544_iwrg_v&akid=3922%2E400544%2Eiwrg_v)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250820_1_climate?amount=5&refcode=em20250820-3922&refcode2=3922_400544_iwrg_v&akid=3922%2E400544%2Eiwrg_v)**
Thank you,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250820-1&t=2&refcode2=3922_400544_iwrg_v&akid=3922%2E400544%2Eiwrg_v)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Peter, have you heard our news?
body:
We’re taking back the U.S. Senate Majority.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250820-2?refcode=em-20250820-2&refcode2=481_1086043_HDyn3d&akid=481%2E1086043%2EHDyn3d)
Peter, this is Roy Cooper, and I’m reaching out with exciting news that I wanted to make sure you heard from me:
**I’m officially running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina.**
We launched our campaign last month, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the response from Democratic supporters across the country. I never take running for office lightly, but more than ever, I _know_ that we can win together.
**[I’m grateful to have Wes Moore's support, and I need yours, too. Could you split a donation between their team and our campaign for Senate right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250820-2?refcode=em-20250820-2&refcode2=481_1086043_HDyn3d&akid=481%2E1086043%2EHDyn3d)**
Here’s why we need to have you with us:
👉 North Carolina’s Senate election is set to be the most competitive of 2026 & The Hill has rated this the most likely Senate seat to flip
👉 Winning here is essential to our chances of taking back the Senate
👉 Republicans are ready to do everything possible to stop us & Donald Trump already handpicked RNC Chair Michael Whatley to run against me
**[Peter, a donation TODAY can help us prepare for Democrats’ most important Senate fight of 2026. Are you with me and Wes Moore in the fight? Split a contribution NOW to stand with us ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250820-2?refcode=em-20250820-2&refcode2=481_1086043_HDyn3d&akid=481%2E1086043%2EHDyn3d)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250820-2?amount=10&refcode=em-20250820-2&refcode2=481_1086043_HDyn3d&akid=481%2E1086043%2EHDyn3d)**
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper
