name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign: Ban price gouging in grocery stories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Congress must prioritize working people over billionaires and corporate greed. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWV-dkr3wqIY_zeAP1tR0OgATPJn-T_hT6DSRR00Yx24Kvg6EKeVOBkNDaPO64jOdzQSvPfggPJzn1bdQmn3mFAL0HkQzqdfxG0HNraRmkVhzXMda1_-rOmJ25zes-e3PJm87xMmGR9jAe0GtUj7mzJ89gD3mSryfG_MNI2F7FDLwi_35dAqSmsEC38R0aCqsl/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h0/h001.gxzaSOEBQO6GMABtgI4-RayumQZAFV9Bue6CjVIhHA0)
---
Friend, Did you know that corporations are purchasing massive amounts of your personal information, then using it to determine whether they think you’ll pay more for an item? That’s right! By using facial recognition technology in the store, or through mobile apps and online shopping, corporations are creating personal profiles of each and every one of us—and then determining what they think we’re willing to pay for any given item. **This is known as surveillance pricing, and it could mean that you’re paying a different price for a bag of grapes or a box of Corn Flakes than the person next to you in line.** Corporations are also using something known as surge pricing to raise prices on items that might be necessary in that moment. Through the use of electronic labels, they can raise and lower prices at will. If it’s raining outside, maybe they raise the price of an umbrella or rain poncho. If it’s hot outside, they might raise the price of water or ice. **This is an outrageous example of corporate greed―especially at a time when 47 million Americans, including 7 million children, are food insecure.** Grocery prices have already skyrocketed by 28% since 2020, and charging needy families more is unconscionable. **That’s why I’ve introduced the**** _Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act_****and I’m co-leading the**** _Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Act_****to address our country’s affordability crisis and protect people from corporate greed.** [**Add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of these policies today to help struggling families and hold greedy corporations accountable.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7D4FCff02KXaUZJo-xnZN-NkNm1tXiPiGWLo-ho6-wKWHIirohZXZYhDL_su1Qdrt8jjgBADu7zoJpNfXbj2G73Ni2J7keVrRAh-bN70xZScCQyQDMz8FlMvaWjIbKPIDRQnuTOzN_7XOcDsnmKVG5W-6yCMowPO6c-XiEJPh2SkdpTFxQtDOl9iA1W9kqFbJaCtW1odm1LND0qYobRYZPEnSAECSqhmJVRYDoMWRazviUxatw5F60ZehhnHHbLWLVeQOvceVzzuHTLGETvOkIDT014YujpO1Wcuekj-cyTYqsrVyWiDaf_U08EK4qwk-SXxTDX2pFVDDWdaQOz446n/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h1/h001.C8xA2__pbgIungffChXFfXquujl8bWc66PWyViM--RU) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7D4FCff02KXaUZJo-xnZN-NkNm1tXiPiGWLo-ho6-wKWHIirohZXZYhDL_su1Qdrt_IwjsYMbX1uxbG_HWiWkWp4UkoHlv9udQTA7xfonyfWYlbSXWXR-fJzeABdgNtWhp9QBgvVBtDKqX_w7_i0URFERanLpLxkLrNr4o2uvb-bMbYIS6YgSa6R4iitbXLKw0TBt3Is3_Ou_MJTmZnA6eSSi-j1jHvEoSpzU0KrmORytDY33PaW6M565vvzZhLwlqhyrRoJ0RFdAo7O3426xBX63AC1jrehF2H-8KebC7QVH-g3zqJP_dgpymx0IWAhKiz_4CHM9ddcPhSdRfjjAh7/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h2/h001.3B69Z6n1pgYu6wSEylfQV6ASdhOBCPfAyrZ2MvNGCtI)
---
The _Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act_ would:
* prohibit surveillance pricing in retail food stores, providing narrow exceptions for discounts for students and seniors;
* require food stores to disclose the use of facial recognition technology;
* ban electronic shelf labels in large retail and grocery stores;
* require the FTC (Federal Trade Commission) to enforce these bans and hold corporations accountable.

I will keep advocating for working families and the majority of Americans who are living paycheck to paycheck. Thank you for demanding Congress put the needs of everyday people over corporate profits.
With you in this fight,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tue, Aug 19, 2025
Subject: Sign: Ban price gouging in grocery stories
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
We’ve seen corporations exploit crises like hurricanes and pandemics to raise prices and price gouge the American people. Now they’re using new technology to inflate grocery prices, even though most Americans are already struggling to afford food.
Have you heard of surge pricing? What about surveillance pricing?
One grocery industry analyst told National Public Radio that, using electronic shelf labels rather than price stickers, grocery stores can raise and lower prices at will: “If it’s hot outside, we can raise the price of water and ice cream.”1 But that’s not all.
**Big grocery chains are also gathering consumers’ personal data, creating profiles on each and every one of us.** They then pair these profiles with the use of mobile apps, online shopping, and even cameras at check-out lanes with facial recognition technology to raise prices on items based on an algorithm’s assessment of your ability to pay. This is surveillance pricing, and it often hits Black and brown communities the hardest.
Target has even been known to raise prices on consumers who are using the Target mobile app while in the store. Their thinking is, you’re already there and will pay whatever price they give you. This is predatory pricing and we’ve got to stop it.
[**To combat corporate greed and demand consumers’ rights, I’ve introduced the**** _Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act_****. Will you add your name now as a grassroots co-sponsor to demand Congress put people over profits?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7D4FCff02KXaUZJo-xnZN-NkNm1tXiPiGWLo-ho6-wKWHIirohZXZYhDL_su1Qdrt_OW2UZ5mbfcwcofde-rHjyZ3JHG1QrSf-Dg5CipFe3kIpA4qlENkVzR_EdfvI7l1y6yXHMoO4TVrvSs4PWNSA4Ry2YxDBiBI6QC8bPIs-mhs91KRiY5Y-Xy8-tMquuzaTEYNn3QrdaFUynHrbpsbVi8QnZduNPWJ9-Zs6yc_w9cEdV0l92tifTOcFJ6awhfAahXUnYvIpgDeEZ-WR5y1Xbdaez7Lkxu33dQzXgRRu6vOD9LqJD4r_m_qrZXgvdQD-5piyRg6ZfKNqIobyo41Kv/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h3/h001.L3NhLOaAKecPFTFnOETyilbdevxENzdWOCBCykUiFy0)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7D4FCff02KXaUZJo-xnZN-NkNm1tXiPiGWLo-ho6-wKWHIirohZXZYhDL_su1Qdrt8_ew8itygi1twdnH8a4DXSivKt_dBOVxzq9nKaI6-VlZFxvN0lCDfx_sDGTWA9EQe5IxITHxp0TIaBY_X9PMBbxmdMiiP-txupeUfPXT98j1GxtLDGVfnm8HX4Yy0OdTmr7TG1A--zK5s3FOgpsCE-y0IyZ-C8Cq8YWvgLJkOoqO3_TzwYESKlwxNG5hbzuO1VuvH9P78_P5Y3qZJGTSWRDKYIXag1Jn_Z19Rcr3BevGY8rapR0P7ChE9EcHVEwfnPNKtz_UaA3zGJHXfg1m7J/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h4/h001.qk6828gXP-qgkTNAABFc_MI-8kTTC21K2iOFviuj-cM)
---
Many of my colleagues in Congress ran on a promise to lower prices for everyday people.
But most also take money from corporations. And as part of their Big Budget Betrayal, Republicans massively cut SNAP nutrition benefits―which will directly harm millions of families’ access to nutritious food―and refused to renew the _Affordable Care Act_ premium tax credit, which has helped working people afford healthcare.
They’re more interested in handing billionaires tax breaks and allowing corporations to rake in record profits, all at our expense.
My _Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act_ would:
* prohibit surveillance pricing in retail food stores (providing narrow exceptions for discounts for students and seniors)
* require food stores to disclose the use of facial recognition technology
* ban electronic shelf labels in large retail and grocery stores
* require the Federal Trade Commission to enforce these bans and hold corporations accountable

I’m also co-leading the _Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Act_ with Rep. Greg Casar to prohibit all companies from using surveillance data to raise prices or lower wages.
[**Add your name now as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act_****and the**** _Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Ac_****t to protect consumers from corporate greed.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7D4FCff02KXaUZJo-xnZN-NkNm1tXiPiGWLo-ho6-wKWHIirohZXZYhDL_su1Qdrt-eDw_c9QDkzlm-e187xWI1vQsEbyv7r1YT_F1R1-LR7AZ6LDmdMsQvwLibWZrbRj74Few_8aEM5meD9CvziTiA1VuGhTJ3uoWhg_m0k1RXmtlIwKK1PnKeukuDNAs5y8UKteQMb_UqWTOTJPyDJNrS8IRQugZZ6L3O47IbYNQvjrBeP0iFvQsyzqGZ3i1wYO4bpxze7l224NGfC_8kVKrlxn3AILR-ihmUyU-CouCwBuP4gIQc-xxvinRPP1ToeYSoWRMwFL_6vhGG_vedKuPf/4j7/S3bVP9lfRiSAN9wMQlY_6g/h5/h001.x8UjniFKOQRCuJdYXcdkXC3iV0BJSPc3b2XmwDrXyzY)
Together, we’re demanding Congress stop exploitation and prioritize the needs of working people over enriching billionaires and fueling corporate greed.
Thank you for taking action today,

clean_body: Congress must prioritize working people over billionaires and corporate greed. | | | Friend, Did you know that corporations are purchasing massive amounts of your personal information, then using it to determine whether they think you’ll pay more for an item? That’s right! By using facial recognition technology in the store, or through mobile apps and online shopping, corporations are creating personal profiles of each and every one of us—and then determining what they think we’re willing to pay for any given item. This is known as surveillance pricing, and it could mean that you’re paying a different price for a bag of grapes or a box of Corn Flakes than the person next to you in line. Corporations are also using something known as surge pricing to raise prices on items that might be necessary in that moment. Through the use of electronic labels, they can raise and lower prices at will. If it’s raining outside, maybe they raise the price of an umbrella or rain poncho. If it’s hot outside, they might raise the price of water or ice. This is an outrageous example of corporate greed―especially at a time when 47 million Americans, including 7 million children, are food insecure. Grocery prices have already skyrocketed by 28% since 2020, and charging needy families more is unconscionable. That’s why I’ve introduced the Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Actand I’m co-leading the Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Actto address our country’s affordability crisis and protect people from corporate greed. | The Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act would: prohibit surveillance pricing in retail food stores, providing narrow exceptions for discounts for students and seniors; require food stores to disclose the use of facial recognition technology; ban electronic shelf labels in large retail and grocery stores; require the FTC (Federal Trade Commission) to enforce these bans and hold corporations accountable. I will keep advocating for working families and the majority of Americans who are living paycheck to paycheck. Thank you for demanding Congress put the needs of everyday people over corporate profits. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Tue, Aug 19, 2025 Subject: Sign: Ban price gouging in grocery stories To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We’ve seen corporations exploit crises like hurricanes and pandemics to raise prices and price gouge the American people. Now they’re using new technology to inflate grocery prices, even though most Americans are already struggling to afford food. Have you heard of surge pricing? What about surveillance pricing? One grocery industry analyst told National Public Radio that, using electronic shelf labels rather than price stickers, grocery stores can raise and lower prices at will: “If it’s hot outside, we can raise the price of water and ice cream.”1 But that’s not all. Big grocery chains are also gathering consumers’ personal data, creating profiles on each and every one of us. They then pair these profiles with the use of mobile apps, online shopping, and even cameras at check-out lanes with facial recognition technology to raise prices on items based on an algorithm’s assessment of your ability to pay. This is surveillance pricing, and it often hits Black and brown communities the hardest. Target has even been known to raise prices on consumers who are using the Target mobile app while in the store. Their thinking is, you’re already there and will pay whatever price they give you. This is predatory pricing and we’ve got to stop it. Many of my colleagues in Congress ran on a promise to lower prices for everyday people. But most also take money from corporations. And as part of their Big Budget Betrayal, Republicans massively cut SNAP nutrition benefits―which will directly harm millions of families’ access to nutritious food―and refused to renew the Affordable Care Act premium tax credit, which has helped working people afford healthcare. They’re more interested in handing billionaires tax breaks and allowing corporations to rake in record profits, all at our expense. My Stop Price Gouging in Grocery Stores Act would: prohibit surveillance pricing in retail food stores (providing narrow exceptions for discounts for students and seniors) require food stores to disclose the use of facial recognition technology ban electronic shelf labels in large retail and grocery stores require the Federal Trade Commission to enforce these bans and hold corporations accountable I’m also co-leading the Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Act with Rep. Greg Casar to prohibit all companies from using surveillance data to raise prices or lower wages. Together, we’re demanding Congress stop exploitation and prioritize the needs of working people over enriching billionaires and fueling corporate greed. Thank you for taking action today, Rashida 1 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Tobias Read
subject: BREAKING: Oregon Rejects Trump Admin Request to Share Private Voter Data
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250820em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250820em]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
The Trump Administration is trying to coerce state governments into sharing sensitive voter data.
But as long as I’m your Secretary of State, that will never happen in Oregon.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250820em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250820em]
Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: Donald Trump is leveraging the power of the US Department of Justice to push his false narrative about voter fraud.
Worst of all, he’s pressuring the states to play along — and share your sensitive and personal voter information with the federal government in the process.
I refuse to play a part in Donald Trump’s unrelenting attack on our elections.
But Trump is using the full force of the White House and the federal government to coerce me into compliance, so I need to know that this grassroots team stands with me at this critical moment.
So please, take my 1-question survey and let me know: Do you support Oregon’s fight against the Trump Administration’s attacks on our elections and our democracy? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/auG4lmiVq06681BB7gmzfw2]
Thanks for your support,
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

**Boll & Branch **
The key to wellness starts with a good night's sleep. Making your night's sleep better starts with quality sheets. Boll & Branch's sheets start unbelievably soft and get softer over time. Boll & Branch sheets are made with the finest 100% organic cotton in a soft, breathable, durable weave. If you're looking for sheets that last, feel amazing, and help you sleep better, Boll & Branch is where it's at. Feel the difference an extraordinary night's sleep can make with Boll & Branch. Just head to https://www.bollandbranch.com/SPICER for 15% OFF and FREE SHIPPING.
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/ President Trump set a 2 week window to get a peace deal done between Russia and Ukraine. As European leaders met at the White House, article 5 securities for Ukraine were discussed. Jack Posobiec, Host of Human Events is here to unpack everything related to Russia-Ukraine. What European countries would actually put boots on the ground in Ukraine? If a peace deal cannot be reached, what is the U.S. involvement coming three to six months from now? Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard stripped 37 intel officials of their security clearances yesterday. The people on the list were a part of the Russia hoax, showing these intelligence agents were acting on a partisan belief rather than delivering on their intelligence duties. Former CIA Operative Bryan Dean Wright tells us who these people are and why it's important this happened. Having worked under John O Brennan, Bryan says Brennan needs to be arrested for his involvement in manipulating intelligence to try and undermine Trump's presidency.
Featuring:
**Jack Posobiec**
Host | Human Events
https://humanevents.com/

Former CIA Operative

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump leans on Putin to justify banning mail-in ballots** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692416/564609141/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiZmYwMy0xMTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ustRs19uMsHcCmFyDwJpp_bRdQ1JD5-ZWK-gQTdxE0U=&emci=21b14471-be7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=7e1bff03-117e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=26828920)
* * *
This is appalling, friend. This past weekend at the Alaska summit, Donald Trump stood beside Vladimir Putin and echoed his claim that mail-in voting makes elections “dishonest.” He even suggested that he agrees with Putin, and pushed a false claim that “no country has mail-in voting”. Let us say this clearly: **mail-in voting is safe, reliable, and used by Americans across the political spectrum.** Trump’s claims aren’t backed by evidence, they’re just parroting Putin’s aim to destabilize our democratic norms. This is exactly the kind of daylight Putin craves: sowing confusion, feigning legitimacy, and emboldening undemocratic tactics at home. **With vote-by-mail now facing _existential_ attacks, we just launched an urgent petition and need signatures from grassroots like you in 43614. That’s why we’re asking:** [**Will you add your name right now to stand against Trump’s attacks on vote-by-mail? We’re hoping to collect at least 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692417/564609142/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiZmYwMy0xMTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ustRs19uMsHcCmFyDwJpp_bRdQ1JD5-ZWK-gQTdxE0U=&emci=21b14471-be7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=7e1bff03-117e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=26828920) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692418/564609143/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTFiZmYwMy0xMTdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ustRs19uMsHcCmFyDwJpp_bRdQ1JD5-ZWK-gQTdxE0U=&emci=21b14471-be7d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=7e1bff03-117e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=26828920)**

name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: Who is the most MAGA in New Jersey
body:
That’s the Republican primary

| |
---
Friend, The NJ-09 Republican primary in this race is heating up. And these days, Republican primaries aren’t about experience or integrity. They’re about loyalty to Donald Trump. While they try to out-MAGA the other, each scrambling to prove who will be more obedient to Trump’s agenda and his extremist allies, Nellie is focused on the people of New Jersey. She’s always been an independent thinker and ran for Congress to deliver real results, not to bow down to special interests or follow orders from party leaders. That means standing up for good-paying jobs, expanding healthcare, lowering costs, protecting seniors, and fighting for policies that actually help working families. That’s what leadership looks like. **[We’re proud of the coalition we’re building. But it’s going to take every one of us to win this race and keep this seat out of MAGA’s hands. clean_body: That’s the Republican primary | | Friend, The NJ-09 Republican primary in this race is heating up. And these days, Republican primaries aren’t about experience or integrity. They’re about loyalty to Donald Trump. While they try to out-MAGA the other, each scrambling to prove who will be more obedient to Trump’s agenda and his extremist allies, Nellie is focused on the people of New Jersey. She’s always been an independent thinker and ran for Congress to deliver real results, not to bow down to special interests or follow orders from party leaders. That means standing up for good-paying jobs, expanding healthcare, lowering costs, protecting seniors, and fighting for policies that actually help working families. That’s what leadership looks like. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Nellie Pou HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. Arizona is a critical swing state — and what happens here matters nationwide. This race isn't just about winning a seat in Congress. It's about proving that people are ready to reject Trump's cruel, corrupt, extremist agenda.
Adelita's opponent proudly supports Trump's tariffs that are driving up costs for families across the country. He defends Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill" that rips away health care, slashes food assistance, guts public schools, and walks away from climate action — all to give billionaires and corporations massive tax breaks.
He stands with Trump's cruel immigration policies: backing the border wall, tearing families apart, and pushing for mass deportations. He supports turning our border into a military zone, militarizing our communities, and even sending people to prison work camps.
That's not who we are. Adelita believes in treating all people with dignity and humanity — no matter where they come from. She's committed to real solutions that strengthen our communities, not divide them.
**Peter, this is one of the first real chances in the country to defeat Trump's agenda — and with just weeks to go before the special general election, we need to help Adelita kick off this next phase of the fight in the strongest position possible.**

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, friend: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and Marcy Kaptur's – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692682/564610044/753658839?refcode=250820_mk_sbsplit_l2&amount=25&ms=250820_mk_sbsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQwNmNkNi0xMjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTtFbH5yzpZJsTF-VsDziCX-Yl7oaDVo1RcIR36sDeY=)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: just wrapped up an event with Gov. Whitmer
body:
|
#
Friend, I just wrapped up our big “Back to School” event with Gov. Whitmer in Grand Blanc, where we spent the afternoon listening to families share stories about the challenges they face every day – from child care costs to overburdened teachers to the rising price of school supplies. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692951/564611009/1362877131?refcode=em-8.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDIxOTg4MS0xNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zs18yB4K-Rj7eON66YHrWi2swuTpkQyu-3870O-wjE8=) These aren’t abstract issues. They’re the realities parents, kids, and teachers are navigating every day here in Michigan. Conversations like today’s remind me why I first stepped up to serve: because families deserve leaders who understand their problems and are committed to solving them. **But here’s the hard truth: none of these problems will get better with Republicans in control of Congress.** They’ve already shown us where their priorities lie – slashing Medicaid and SNAP, undermining public schools, putting tax cuts for the wealthy ahead of working families, chaotic tariffs that make everything more expensive... _and that’s just the tip of the iceberg, to be frank._ If we want to lower costs for families, invest in public schools, and give working people a fair shot, we need to win back the majority next year. **That starts right here in MI-08, friend.** Republicans have made this Trump-won district one of their top targets, and if we don’t win, the path back to the majority gets much steeper. [**So please, friend: can you chip in right now to help us fight back and put a check on the extreme GOP agenda? $3 from you would be a huge lift.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692952/564611010/1362877131?refcode=em-8.20.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDIxOTg4MS0xNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zs18yB4K-Rj7eON66YHrWi2swuTpkQyu-3870O-wjE8=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113692953/564611011/1362877131?refcode=em-8.20.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDIxOTg4MS0xNDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zs18yB4K-Rj7eON66YHrWi2swuTpkQyu-3870O-wjE8=)**

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.
---

clean_body: This is urgent, Peter. = Breaking news: A new Roanoke College poll shows Abigail's opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, closing the gap in the Virginia Governor's race. = This is urgent, Peter. = Peter, make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger: If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = Let's be clear about where things stand: Abigail remains in a strong position to flip Virginia blue. But four years ago, Republicans won the Governorship after consistently being down in polls. And this poll shows that tens of thousands of voters remain undecided. Now, with Trump attacking Abigail directly, we can't take anything for granted. We know it seems small in the scheme of things, but your $25 will fund critical investments in ads and organizers, which could be the difference between victory and defeat on November 4th. = = = = = = = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Brad Finstad
subject: Democrats Put Illegal Immigrants Ahead of Minnesotans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, You’ve probably seen the news—Democrats in Minneapolis are doubling down on their radical sanctuary city policies. Democratic Socialist Omar Fateh is openly vowing to _protect illegal immigrants and criminals_ from the Trump Administration, even as hardworking Minnesotans struggle with rising costs, crime, and broken communities. Let me be clear: sanctuary cities don’t protect anyone. They endanger families, strain local resources, and put the rights of illegal immigrants above the rights of law-abiding citizens. While the Left caters to open-borders activists, I’m fighting in Congress to secure our border, stop the flow of deadly fentanyl, and restore the rule of law. We should be protecting Minnesota families, not shielding those who break our immigration laws. But the Democrats and their wealthy liberal donors are pouring millions into making sure their radical agenda spreads. That’s why I need you on my team. Will you chip in today to help me fight the Left’s dangerous sanctuary city agenda? Every dollar makes sure we have the resources to stand strong for law, order, and America’s sovereignty.

clean_body: Today is Steve’s Birthday, and as his staff, we’ve taken over his email to ask you to join us in giving him a special birthday gift. | Fellow American, Today is Steve’s Birthday, and as his staff, we’ve taken over his email to ask you to join us in giving him a special birthday gift. Steve’s working overtime to defend our Republican Senate Majority and fight for President Trump’s America First Vision. We want to show him our appreciation for leading the Conservative fight in the Senate. We hope the Senator will see your name when he reads his card. Thank you, Team Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Fellow Conservative,

You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most.

But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you.

I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over.

Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash.

And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative.

So here’s what I’m asking:

[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250820.nkD3xc&refcode=em20250820-9584-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9584%2E2526796%2EfX4n-U)
Last month, the Big Ugly Bill ended Biden's Saving on a Valuable Education (SAVE) student loan repayment plan — ending smaller payments, based on income and family size, for almost 8 million student loan borrowers.1
Yesterday, the Department of Education announced they want to end Public Service Loan Forgiveness for thousands of borrowers employed by non-profit organizations that work with trans people or immigrants, support Palestine, or have DEI programs.2
**We "dont have the money" for student loan forgiveness unless you're willing to directly carry out this administration's authoritarian agenda**.
**[Our movement for real change for working people in this country — from guaranteed healthcare to student loan debt forgiveness — will have to push harder than ever these next few years. Will you make a $5 contribution today to power Alexandria's fight in Congress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250820.nkD3xc&refcode=em20250820-9584-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9584%2E2526796%2EfX4n-U)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250820.nkD3xc&refcode=em20250820-9584-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9584%2E2526796%2EfX4n-U)**
**Our nation's trillion dollar student loan debt emergency is a moral hazard**.
We will keep you posted as more on this story, and ICE, develops.
Thank you for standing with us,
Team AOC

Peter,

**I 'm looking for some Patriots to join me in packing up Ilhan Omar's bags and sending her back to where she came from: Somalia.** Are you with me?

She has a storied history of outwardly hating America as a U.S. Congresswoman, and her recent comments are the straw that broke the camel's back. Here's just a couple of examples of what I'm talking about:

_"[America is] now turned into one of the worst countries." \- Ilhan Omar, June 2025

"While I am in Congress, no one will take Somalia's sea." - Ilhan Omar, January 2024_
**Congresswoman Omar, if you hate America so much, you are more than welcome to leave.**

If you think America is one of the worst countries in the world, and if your priority as a Representative for Americans is to protect Somalia's seas, then it's time for you to head back to Somalia, where you apparently belong.

_**I did the legwork myself. It 'll cost $1,783 for a one-way trip to Somalia.**_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8f1d028f3ea044db8f724adc396fa920&_e=hohgaj3_U9ttvPfUTxrah0V7c0-LKtEYPHcg4UphKrlFFzdOdGAxE-wby_6fa7d86AI-0PALrEOvaQ8d0kY7sx2LQvvdwncKwDXSGr29-bex7MpfC3qBQGl4pOyuahoil1fR7H3i12PF_FiygEyQF48rp4HudUU_Uw8eoxXt2XbmidROTBQ9JsLD0BG9C_Vv5bHeaTfMLjqF_mMnkj-ANd8axnS_-4uiz7TCcPg0JMoFLqZqarBKVtqI0Bpag-58A6ieK1GYQeW8wq54XwEUtinil-QEQOgKUWW9XfqIY8kIIXQKv6cEUzFS3fGQwyUvP0P5ii8lH-ua4xqpJH9qwiuYD-Mw5A1ndaJvfmjZSrTrODqUiv0th6UQVSHzzBPUYSUQGGU3LoRFFQJgRgCS1_jO66qaPhhG927xUPEGjKLDthywuq9elDc51TwEuPvZOiHmws7Qsy8-jriq4_qKEbt7Tks63XFH7bNpZPzuPUsy6r89jMLvzIKXmb5W1_j2mHvxZA_O-V4zk6E7BdLFyrMnG9Y1YerIwJZCFgRifc10K7mawWtc1Jr2Ublqbe5H)

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Keep this seat in the people’s hands
body:
| | Peter,

Southwest Washingtonians are strong and independent, deeply immersed in our community. We don’t let the party bosses in D.C. call the shots. That’s why I work hard every day in Congress to deliver for the people here – not for a political party or a special interest group.

**But, national Republicans have started pouring money into this race to try to replace me with someone they can control.**

I’m counting on your help now, Peter. Together, we can keep this seat in local hands and make sure Southwest Washington’s voice can’t be bought. Americans don’t
pay taxes so that Benjamin Netanyahu and his far-right government can
launch a full-scale ground invasion of Gaza — on top of the genocide
already being perpetrated against millions of people there.

The fact that any lawmaker is okay with this misuse of our tax dollars is
an indictment of a broken political system — the same system that lets the
richest, most powerful country in the world have crumbling schools,
unaffordable healthcare, and people who can’t afford groceries or rent.

Yet Washington is still writing blank checks for endless war instead of
investing in our communities.

It’s wrong. And that’s why our campaign is advocating to invest our tax
dollars in improving life, not ending it. That means:

* Passing Medicare for All

* Giving every child a quality education

But to bring this fight to the U.S. Senate, we’re counting on your

subject: Three years ago…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
three years ago, President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law!

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693287/564612154/1435897075?refcode=email_082025_IRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJkNDg3Ni0xNjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBbkhudutdVQy-sZuZ-PLd_KlGOLnbFQl3rxp9T6wSQ=&emci=6d396166-e17d-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&emdi=d0bd4876-167e-f011-b481-6045bda9d23e&ceid=7280715) Folks — three years ago, President Joe Biden signed our _Inflation Reduction Act_ into law, legislation I’d spent months negotiating and fine-tuning with my colleagues. We lowered prescription drug prices, expanded health care coverage, and passed the single LARGEST climate investment in history. And we paid for every penny of it by making corporations and the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share. The _Inflation Reduction Act_ is one of our proudest accomplishments in the Senate. **Let’s continue the fight for progress:** **[Can you chip in $10 to help us keep delivering for Colorado families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693289/564612155/1506335976?refcode=email_082025_IRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJkNDg3Ni0xNjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBbkhudutdVQy-sZuZ-PLd_KlGOLnbFQl3rxp9T6wSQ=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693291/564612157/1506335976?refcode=email_082025_IRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGJkNDg3Ni0xNjdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBbkhudutdVQy-sZuZ-PLd_KlGOLnbFQl3rxp9T6wSQ=)

We invested billions to transition to clean energy, reduce emissions, and install energy-efficient home upgrades like heat pumps and electric stoves — making it cheaper for families to heat and cool their home while creating millions of good-paying, clean energy jobs.
And that's not all! The _Inflation Reduction Act_ also expanded health care coverage and lowered prescription drug costs, putting money back into millions of Americans’ pockets.
So on the anniversary of this bill's passage, it is important to remember: **Our Democratic majority in Congress is what made all of this possible.** _Not a single Republican voted for this bill._
Look, you sent me to the Senate to fight for climate action, affordability, and good-paying jobs. We’ve made some progress, but there’s still plenty of work to get done in Washington. **Now, we’ve got to take back the majority and stop Trump and the Republicans from rolling back all of the progress we’ve made, and get to work delivering even more for Colorado’s working people.**
**[So what do you say? Can you chip in $10 to help Democrats rebuild our Senate majority? clean_body: three years ago, President Joe Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act into law! Folks — three years ago, President Joe Biden signed our Inflation Reduction Act into law, legislation I’d spent months negotiating and fine-tuning with my colleagues. We lowered prescription drug prices, expanded health care coverage, and passed the single LARGEST climate investment in history. And we paid for every penny of it by making corporations and the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share. The Inflation Reduction Act is one of our proudest accomplishments in the Senate. Let’s continue the fight for progress: = | | = We invested billions to transition to clean energy, reduce emissions, and install energy-efficient home upgrades like heat pumps and electric stoves — making it cheaper for families to heat and cool their home while creating millions of good-paying, clean energy jobs. And that's not all! The Inflation Reduction Act also expanded health care coverage and lowered prescription drug costs, putting money back into millions of Americans’ pockets. So on the anniversary of this bill's passage, it is important to remember: Our Democratic majority in Congress is what made all of this possible. Not a single Republican voted for this bill. Look, you sent me to the Senate to fight for climate action, affordability, and good-paying jobs. We’ve made some progress, but there’s still plenty of work to get done in Washington. Now, we’ve got to take back the majority and stop Trump and the Republicans from rolling back all of the progress we’ve made, and get to work delivering even more for Colorado’s working people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, John | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Time to level set
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Next year's elections will be like no other in our lives. We can’t afford to have anybody stay on the sidelines. I am gearing up for that fight, and I’ll be going wherever I’m needed.
#

Peter, Ruben Gallego here.
I want to be real clear about what’s happening right now:
**Trump is coming after YOUR right to vote.**
He’s teased some extreme kind of election reform action, coming soon. He’s told his most loyal governors to gerrymander their states even further to stack the deck in his favor. And he’s made it clear that he wants to end voting by mail.
Our soldiers deployed overseas vote by mail. They put their lives on the line for us, but Trump doesn’t think they deserve to vote.
In Arizona, we know how necessary, safe, and easy voting by mail is. 80% of Arizona does it — seniors, parents with full schedules, the disabled. It works.
Voting by mail has always been safe, and there is no credible evidence to the contrary. Courts have confirmed that over and over again, just ask Kari Lake.
To Trump, that doesn’t matter. He thinks making it harder to vote helps him, and that's why he's doing this. We have never, ever had a president or a White House as anti-democratic as this one.
Next year's elections will be like no other in our lives. We can’t afford to have anybody stay on the sidelines. I am gearing up for that fight, and I’ll be going wherever I’m needed.
I have one question for you: Are you with me?
[**Chip in to my campaign and let’s show Trump we will not back down. We all need to do our part to make sure next year’s elections are free and fair.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250820-1-160&t=1&akid=3940%2E734936%2Ejn5Ssw)

name: Team Pramila
subject: ICE is handing out shady no-bid contracts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
These companies are profiting off of locking people up in detention centers where immigrant families are subjected to some of the worst conditions imaginable.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250820-5357-footer&t=1&akid=5357%2E420207%2EJNRtc7)
This is despicable, Peter:
The Trump administration has been handing out **no-bid contracts** worth hundreds of millions of dollars to **private prison giants** like CoreCivic and GEO Group — two companies that together donated millions to Republican campaigns and Trump’s inaugural committee.
These companies are profiting off of locking people up in detention centers where immigrant families are subjected to some of the worst conditions imaginable.
**It’s unacceptable, and it’s happening in secret, with no accountability.** That’s why Pramila joined her colleagues in Congress in demanding immediate oversight of ICE’s shady contracting practices.
But we know that pressure from Congress alone isn’t enough. We need to show Trump and his cronies that the people are watching, and we won’t let our government become a cash cow for private prison corporations who have a profit incentive to lock up as many people as possible.
👉🏽 [**Will you add your name to our petition demanding the Trump administration stop giving no-bid contracts to ICE’s private prison profiteers?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250820-1-private-prison-petition/?source=em20250820-5357&akid=5357%2E420207%2EJNRtc7)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250820-1-private-prison-petition/?source=em20250820-5357&akid=5357%2E420207%2EJNRtc7)**
Every voice adds to the pressure. If we speak out together, we can expose this corruption and stop taxpayer dollars from being funneled into the cruel, abusive practices these companies are carrying out.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250820-5357-footer&t=2&refcode2=5357_420207_JNRtc7&akid=5357%2E420207%2EJNRtc7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: This is a long email, but it’s one I hope you take the time to read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We’ve got big plans for 2026, and I could use your help. |
#
---
Team, My team and I are already preparing for the 2026 midterms — and the stakes in Michigan couldn’t be higher. But we can’t do this alone. So I have a big ask today that I hope you’ll consider. **[If you’re in this fight with me, please consider making a recurring contribution today. Every dollar adds up, so even just $5 makes a BIG difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693753/564613468/1700965107?recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBhMmI0ZjEtMTg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A0fCGcEuOBQXI-C4NRZG-CQM-ZdaG-J5TqDjHarYTiU=)** | | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693754/564613469/1700965107?recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBhMmI0ZjEtMTg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A0fCGcEuOBQXI-C4NRZG-CQM-ZdaG-J5TqDjHarYTiU=)
---
We need to make early investments to defend Michigan’s Senate seat, win back a Democratic trifecta at home, and elect new leaders who will shape the future of this country for years to come.
**The other side is already spending** — we can’t afford to fall behind. And the truth is that small-dollar recurring donations can have one of the most significant impacts on our success.
Ongoing, monthly support helps us budget better, plan ahead to build our movement’s power, and invest in long-term infrastructure.
One of the biggest lessons from recent cycles is clear: long-term organizing wins elections. Sustained grassroots support gives us the resources to keep building, not just show up at the last minute.
And making a recurring donation is one of the biggest impacts you can have on our success. It allows us to plan with the confidence that you will be there — working alongside us — every step of the way.
I’m grateful to the tens of thousands of people who pitched in what they could to power our work. Grassroots donors are the number one source of donations to our team. **I know it’s a big ask, but if it’s in your budget, I’m asking you to join this team by becoming a sustaining donor to Fight Like Hell PAC today.**
**[Will you make a monthly recurring donation of any amount to support our work? Small-dollar contributions allow us to plan and invest more strategically to win the important fights ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693755/564613470/1700965107?recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBhMmI0ZjEtMTg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A0fCGcEuOBQXI-C4NRZG-CQM-ZdaG-J5TqDjHarYTiU=)**
| [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113693756/564613471/1700965107?recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250820_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzBhMmI0ZjEtMTg3ZS1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkYTlkMjNlIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=A0fCGcEuOBQXI-C4NRZG-CQM-ZdaG-J5TqDjHarYTiU=)
---
Together, we’ve lowered costs for families, protected reproductive rights, expanded voting access, and made record investments in good-paying jobs and infrastructure.
But the work ahead will be bigger and harder than ever. Washington Republicans and their billionaire donors want to flip Michigan red, roll back our freedoms, and take away the progress we’ve fought for.
If we lose, they succeed. But if we stand strong together, we’ll protect Michigan and help flip the Senate majority for the country.
Thank you _again_ for your continued support. I hope you know how much it means to me.
— Gretchen
Fight Like Hell PAC

clean_body: We’ve got big plans for 2026, and I could use your help. | Team, My team and I are already preparing for the 2026 midterms — and the stakes in Michigan couldn’t be higher. But we can’t do this alone. So I have a big ask today that I hope you’ll consider. = | | = We need to make early investments to defend Michigan’s Senate seat, win back a Democratic trifecta at home, and elect new leaders who will shape the future of this country for years to come. The other side is already spending — we can’t afford to fall behind. And the truth is that small-dollar recurring donations can have one of the most significant impacts on our success. Ongoing, monthly support helps us budget better, plan ahead to build our movement’s power, and invest in long-term infrastructure. One of the biggest lessons from recent cycles is clear: long-term organizing wins elections. Sustained grassroots support gives us the resources to keep building, not just show up at the last minute. And making a recurring donation is one of the biggest impacts you can have on our success. It allows us to plan with the confidence that you will be there — working alongside us — every step of the way. I’m grateful to the tens of thousands of people who pitched in what they could to power our work. Grassroots donors are the number one source of donations to our team. I know it’s a big ask, but if it’s in your budget, I’m asking you to join this team by becoming a sustaining donor to Fight Like Hell PAC today. = | = Together, we’ve lowered costs for families, protected reproductive rights, expanded voting access, and made record investments in good-paying jobs and infrastructure. But the work ahead will be bigger and harder than ever. Washington Republicans and their billionaire donors want to flip Michigan red, roll back our freedoms, and take away the progress we’ve fought for. If we lose, they succeed. But if we stand strong together, we’ll protect Michigan and help flip the Senate majority for the country. Thank you again for your continued support. I hope you know how much it means to me. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Delia refuses to play nice in fascist times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, Justice Democrats’ Rep. Delia Ramirez has been the
recent target of far-right Republicans like Andy Ogles, who’ve been
calling for her to be denaturalized and deported after celebrating her
Guatemalan American roots at an international event.

As Current Affairs highlighted in a new interview, Delia has stood strong
and stayed focused on fighting fascism, not playing nice with the cowards
she serves with in Congress.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250820?refcode=em20250820-36944&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36944_1203867_SRNhA-&akid=36944%2E1203867%2ESRNhA- ]Current Affairs: The Illinois congresswoman responds to calls for her
deportation and explains why she refuses to play nice in fascist times.

The first Latina Congresswoman from the Midwest has been one of the few
House members to call ICE what it is (a terrorist organization), call what
Israel is doing to Gaza what it is (a genocide), and call Donald Trump
what he is (a pedophile).

Republicans are trying to distract and deflect from the truth with their
ugly attacks on diversity, immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and
more. Delia and her fellow Justice Democrats are not just calling them
out, but taking bold action in Congress to stop them.

While the GOP protects the pedophile-in-chief and cuts $1 trillion from
Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security to give tax breaks to
billionaires, Justice Democrats like Delia are introducing legislation and
taking other steps to:

* Stop the U.S. from sending weapons to Israel and other countries
committing genocide through the Block the Bombs Act.
* Force the Department of Justice to release the Epstein files.
* Hold ICE accountable and stop their masked, plainclothes agents from
disappearing people off the streets of our communities.

With the 2026 elections rapidly approaching, we need to protect incumbent
progressive champions like Delia from right-wing attacks AND elect even
more working-class candidates to unseat cowardly, do-nothing Democrats.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250820?refcode=em20250820-36944&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36944_1203867_SRNhA-&akid=36944%2E1203867%2ESRNhA- ]Can you chip in $5 now to directly support our work to
do just that?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250820?refcode=em20250820-36944&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36944_1203867_SRNhA-&akid=36944%2E1203867%2ESRNhA- ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250820-36944-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36944_1203867_SRNhA-&akid=36944%2E1203867%2ESRNhA-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36944%2E1203867%2ESRNhA-

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: The stakes keep getting higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40041%2E3422442%2EJR_Ca9)
Peter,
The California governor’s race is in full swing, and with Trump’s attacks on our democracy the stakes couldn’t be higher.
**[If you’re ready to help elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor, chip in now >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250820_1_ak?refcode=em20250820-40041&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40041_3422442_JR_Ca9&akid=40041%2E3422442%2EJR_Ca9)**
Here’s where things stand. First, Kamala Harris announced she would not run for Governor, making Katie the clear Democratic frontrunner. **An Emerson Poll showed Katie’s in the lead and gaining momentum** —but with nearly 40% of voters still undecided, we have to work hard to reach them.
Now, our opponents have Katie in their sights. MAGA Republicans are gearing up to try to flip California red. A billionaire has already spent over a million dollars on ads. This race won’t be a walk in the park, Peter, and Katie needs us to pull together if we’re going to win.
On top of it all, Donald Trump is trying to steal the 2026 midterm elections in plain sight—redrawing Congressional maps and threatening to eliminate mail-in voting.
That’s why this race is so critical: California’s next governor needs to be ready to use California’s strength to protect democracy for everyone.
**Katie Porter is the governor California needs to fight back against Trump and lower costs for people across the state.** But to win, she’ll need the resources to keep her lead and finish strong.
**[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today to protect our democracy and help Katie win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250820_1_ak?refcode=em20250820-40041&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40041_3422442_JR_Ca9&akid=40041%2E3422442%2EJR_Ca9)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250820_1_ak?refcode=em20250820-40041&refcode2=40041_3422442_JR_Ca9&akid=40041%2E3422442%2EJR_Ca9)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

clean_body: Peter, The California governor’s race is in full swing, and with Trump’s attacks on our democracy the stakes couldn’t be higher. Here’s where things stand. First, Kamala Harris announced she would not run for Governor, making Katie the clear Democratic frontrunner. An Emerson Poll showed Katie’s in the lead and gaining momentum —but with nearly 40% of voters still undecided, we have to work hard to reach them. Now, our opponents have Katie in their sights. MAGA Republicans are gearing up to try to flip California red. A billionaire has already spent over a million dollars on ads. This race won’t be a walk in the park, Peter, and Katie needs us to pull together if we’re going to win. On top of it all, Donald Trump is trying to steal the 2026 midterm elections in plain sight—redrawing Congressional maps and threatening to eliminate mail-in voting. That’s why this race is so critical: California’s next governor needs to be ready to use California’s strength to protect democracy for everyone. Katie Porter is the governor California needs to fight back against Trump and lower costs for people across the state. But to win, she’ll need the resources to keep her lead and finish strong. Thank you, Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

body:

Peter ,
It’s no surprise that Trump’s gerrymander in Texas is moving forward today. Republicans have the votes, and they were always going to use them.
But here’s what matters: thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’ve already launched rapid-response ads in the most competitive districts, making sure voters know exactly what’s happening.
This was never about fairness or updated census data; it was about Donald Trump pressuring Republicans to grab five more congressional seats -- mid-decade -- to protect his fragile majority in the House.
Yesterday, Texas Republicans proved it. They rejected every Democratic amendment, ignored flood victims demanding relief, and instead pushed through an illegal, discriminatory map designed to silence voters of color and lock in their power.
We never expected them to suddenly “do the right thing.” That’s why our job is to hold them accountable and to make sure every voter in these battleground districts knows exactly what their so-called representatives just did.
If Republicans think they can silence us by drawing new lines on a map, they’re wrong. Together, we’ll make sure voters decide who represents them – not Donald Trump.
Support our work now as we gear up to fight in critical elections this November in Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email08202025&amount=25]

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: No secret police on America's streets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I'm joining Sens. Padilla and Booker to introduce a bill requiring ICE to display visible identification during operations – here's why:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113695081/564617898/1430119325?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk532-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU5ZDE5NS0xZDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84GWDnQqbT1c1IZEe7G0nZcLmJTUa_YU6jI9sTrhreI=)
---
Peter – let's get one thing straight:
Anyone being detained by law enforcement in America not only deserves but is _entitled to know_ who is detaining them and why.
So as immigration enforcement agents adopt thuggish tactics to terrorize communities in Washington state and across the country – _not to mention my colleague, California's Sen. Padilla_ – **I'm joining him and Sen. Booker in introducing a new bill requiring immigration officers to display visible identification during public operations.**
The VISIBLE Act, short for the _Visible Identification Standards for Immigration-Based Law Enforcement Act of 2025, _has three points:
* Immigration enforcement officers will be required to wear clear identification for themselves and their agency, unobscured by clothes or tactical gear.

* Aside from environmental hazards or covert operations, they will be banned from wearing masks, gaiters, balaclavas, or anything else that obscures their identity.

* The DHS will also be required to set disciplinary procedures for violations, investigate complaints, and make annual compliance reports to Congress.

Under Trump's mass deportation agenda, we've seen unidentified masked agents indiscriminately snatch folks off the streets, from workplaces and homes, cuff them, and drive away in unmarked vans on a near-daily basis.

In turn, onlookers are left horrified, unsure whether their loved ones, neighbors, and coworkers will be seen alive again.
And without visible badges, names, or insignia, members of the public often have no way to confirm whether they are interacting with legitimate government officials – _or being kidnapped by imposters._

It's unacceptable, it's unlawful, and it's un-American.
**This law shouldn't even be necessary.** But the Trump administration is doing everything it can to stoke terror in immigrant communities and make us all afraid to stand up to any kind of constitutional abuse. As such, commonsense measures like this are critical to saving any trust the American people may still have in their government.

Passing a law like this isn’t likely in a Republican-controlled Congress, but I believe Democrats have to show that we will fight to rein in the kinds of overreach we’re seeing right now.
Peter, I will always fight in the other Washington to make your voice heard in the Senate.
Thank you for putting your trust in me.

Patty Murray
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113695082/564617899/1430119325?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk532-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTU5ZDE5NS0xZDdlLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRhOWQyM2UiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=84GWDnQqbT1c1IZEe7G0nZcLmJTUa_YU6jI9sTrhreI=)

name: Democrats.org
subject: An update on California:
body:
---
Derek, If you’ve been waiting for the right time to take action, _this is it._ Let us explain: You may have seen that Trump and his allies are moving forward with their plans to rig the 2026 election in their favor. In Texas, Republicans are moving ahead with a new gerrymandered map to give themselves FIVE congressional seats. **We can’t just sit by and do nothing in response. So in California, Governor Gavin Newsom is calling for a special election to redraw the state’s maps and defend fair representation, countering Republicans’ gerrymandering in Texas.** In California, voters will get to weigh in on the new maps — which means we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us. With so much on the line, Republicans are undoubtedly going to throw _everything they have_ at preventing this ballot measure from passing. Democrats need your help to fight back. **[That’s why we’re asking: Can we count on you to split a $10 contribution today between the California Democratic Party and the DNC to help power Democrats’ work to defend our democracy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ca-split?refcode=em_20250820_4374_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4374_22930333_L5fDrL&akid=4374%2E22930333%2EL5fDrL)**

**Nampa, Idaho - **Senator Brian Lenney, a proven conservative leader, announces his re-election campaign for the Idaho State Senate in the Republican Primary on May 20, 2026.

Recognized as one of Idaho's most effective senators, Lenney earned the _2025 CPAC Award for Conservative Excellence_ and a top ranking from _Club for Growth_ for driving economic growth. His 2025 legislative victories in education, health freedom, and limited government solidify his commitment to The Gem State.
> "Idahoans need a senator who delivers results, not excuses," said Lenney. "My 2025 record proves I fight for freedom, parental rights, and the American worker. Illegal immigration threatens our communities, and I'll keep pushing to protect our way of life and put Idahoans first."
In just three terms, Senator Lenney has amassed an impressive record of legislative victories, establishing himself as a formidable force and a leading voice in Idaho conservatism. In his most recent 2025 legislative session, Senator Lenney secured key victories for freedom and accountability. His notable achievements include spearheading Idaho's first anti-lawfare bill (S1001) to protect free speech, banning mask mandates (H32), limiting public health district powers (S1031), and ensuring Health & Welfare bureaucratic accountability (S1052), to name just a few of his significant wins.
> "I'm fighting to protect Idaho's values and secure our future," Lenney declared. "I've empowered parents, curbed government overreach, and tackled disastrous covid-era policies. Now, we must defend American sovereignty and put Idaho first with unyielding resolve."
Lenney's campaign will zero in on curbing illegal immigration, expanding parental rights, and protecting Idaho from woke nanny-state policies.
To learn more about Lenney visit **[www.votelenney.com](https://substack.com/redirect/89aa5108-4d74-4c46-a73a-f583c238c489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**

clean_body: Official Press Release | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Official Press Release | | | Aug 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | NEWS PROVIDED BY August 20, 2025 | | ---|---|--- Nampa, Idaho - Senator Brian Lenney, a proven conservative leader, announces his re-election campaign for the Idaho State Senate in the Republican Primary on May 20, 2026. Recognized as one of Idaho's most effective senators, Lenney earned the 2025 CPAC Award for Conservative Excellence and a top ranking from Club for Growth for driving economic growth. His 2025 legislative victories in education, health freedom, and limited government solidify his commitment to The Gem State. "Idahoans need a senator who delivers results, not excuses," said Lenney. "My 2025 record proves I fight for freedom, parental rights, and the American worker. Illegal immigration threatens our communities, and I'll keep pushing to protect our way of life and put Idahoans first." In just three terms, Senator Lenney has amassed an impressive record of legislative victories, establishing himself as a formidable force and a leading voice in Idaho conservatism. In his most recent 2025 legislative session, Senator Lenney secured key victories for freedom and accountability. His notable achievements include spearheading Idaho's first anti-lawfare bill (S1001) to protect free speech, banning mask mandates (H32), limiting public health district powers (S1031), and ensuring Health & Welfare bureaucratic accountability (S1052), to name just a few of his significant wins. "I'm fighting to protect Idaho's values and secure our future," Lenney declared. "I've empowered parents, curbed government overreach, and tackled disastrous covid-era policies. Now, we must defend American sovereignty and put Idaho first with unyielding resolve." Lenney's campaign will zero in on curbing illegal immigration, expanding parental rights, and protecting Idaho from woke nanny-state policies. To learn more about Lenney visit . | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?
